from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import ast
import copy
import dataclasses
import hashlib
import json
import os
import re
import resource
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
import tempfile
import time
from collections import defaultdict
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Iterable, Mapping, Sequence

try:
    import yaml
except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover - repository requirements include PyYAML
    yaml = None

IR_SCHEMA_VERSION = "design-ir/v1.0"
PROTOCOL_VERSION = "design-adapter-protocol/v1.0"
ADAPTER_MANIFEST_VERSION = "design-adapter-manifest/v1.0"
SUPPORT_REGISTRY_VERSION = "design-support-registry/v1.0"
CONFIG_VERSION = "designflow-config/v1.0"
BUNDLE_VERSION = "design-bundle/v1.0"
GRAPH_VERSION = "design-graph/v1.0"
CONFORMANCE_VERSION = "design-conformance/v1.0"
RENDERER_VERSION = "designflow-renderer/v1.0"
GENERATOR_VERSION = "designflow/v1.0"

LIFECYCLES = {"candidate", "experimental", "supported", "deprecated", "removed"}
RESULT_STATUSES = {
    "exact",
    "derived",
    "observed",
    "partial",
    "unknown",
    "unsupported",
    "conflict",
    "not_applicable",
}
FAIL_CLOSED_STATUSES = {"partial", "unknown", "unsupported", "conflict"}
MODES = {"static", "build", "executable-contract", "runtime-registry", "controlled-observation"}
ENFORCEMENTS = {"Invariant", "Risk-selected", "Advisory", "Periodic"}
AUTHORITY_RANK = {
    "artifact": 100,
    "runtime-registry": 95,
    "typed-config": 90,
    "executable-contract": 85,
    "source": 75,
    "controlled-observation": 65,
    "external": 50,
    "unknown": 0,
}
SECRET_PATTERNS = (
    re.compile(r"AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}"),
    re.compile(r"ASIA[0-9A-Z]{16}"),
    re.compile(r"-----BEGIN (?:RSA |EC |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY-----"),
    re.compile(
        r"(?i)(?:api[_-]?key|client[_-]?secret|password|passwd|token)"
        r"\s*[:=]\s*['\"]?([A-Za-z0-9_./+=:-]{8,})"
    ),
)
HTTP_METHODS = {"get", "post", "put", "patch", "delete", "options", "head", "trace"}


class DesignflowError(RuntimeError):
    """Base class for deterministic, user-facing designflow failures."""

    code = "DESIGNFLOW_ERROR"

    def __init__(self, message: str, *, details: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None):
        super().__init__(message)
        self.details = dict(details or {})


class ContractError(DesignflowError):
    code = "CONTRACT_INVALID"


class SecurityViolation(DesignflowError):
    code = "SECURITY_REJECTION"


class MigrationRequired(DesignflowError):
    code = "MIGRATION_REQUIRED"


class DriftDetected(DesignflowError):
    code = "DESIGN_DRIFT"


@dataclasses.dataclass(frozen=True)
class AdapterContext:
    root: Path
    project_id: str
    profile_ids: tuple[str, ...]
    adapter_config: Mapping[str, Any]
    normalized_environment: Mapping[str, str]


@dataclasses.dataclass
class AdapterFragment:
    adapter: Mapping[str, Any]
    facts: list[dict[str, Any]]
    relations: list[dict[str, Any]]
    capability_results: list[dict[str, Any]]
    diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]]
    inputs: list[dict[str, Any]]

    def as_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "protocol_version": PROTOCOL_VERSION,
            "adapter": dict(self.adapter),
            "facts": self.facts,
            "relations": self.relations,
            "capability_results": self.capability_results,
            "diagnostics": self.diagnostics,
            "inputs": self.inputs,
        }


@dataclasses.dataclass(frozen=True)
class BundleResult:
    project_id: str
    output_dir: Path
    files: Mapping[str, bytes]
    ir: Mapping[str, Any]
    manifest: Mapping[str, Any]
    exit_code: int


def canonical_json_bytes(value: Any) -> bytes:
    return (
        json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, separators=(",", ":")) + "\n"
    ).encode("utf-8")


def pretty_json_bytes(value: Any) -> bytes:
    return (json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, indent=2) + "\n").encode("utf-8")


def sha256_bytes(value: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(value).hexdigest()


def sha256_object(value: Any) -> str:
    return sha256_bytes(canonical_json_bytes(value))


def stable_id(prefix: str, *parts: Any) -> str:
    normalized = "\x1f".join(str(part).strip() for part in parts)
    digest = hashlib.sha256(normalized.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:24]
    safe_prefix = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9_.-]+", "-", prefix.lower()).strip("-") or "id"
    return f"{safe_prefix}:{digest}"


def natural_sort_key(value: Any) -> tuple[Any, ...]:
    return tuple(int(part) if part.isdigit() else part.lower() for part in re.split(r"(\d+)", str(value)))


def canonicalize(value: Any) -> Any:
    if isinstance(value, dict):
        return {str(key): canonicalize(value[key]) for key in sorted(value, key=str)}
    if isinstance(value, list):
        normalized = [canonicalize(item) for item in value]
        if all(isinstance(item, dict) and any(key.endswith("_id") for key in item) for item in normalized):
            return sorted(normalized, key=lambda item: canonical_json_bytes(item))
        return normalized
    if isinstance(value, Path):
        return value.as_posix()
    return value


def load_data(path: Path) -> Any:
    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    if path.suffix.lower() == ".json":
        return json.loads(text)
    if yaml is None:
        raise ContractError(f"YAML support is unavailable for {path}")
    return yaml.safe_load(text)


def dump_yaml(value: Any) -> str:
    if yaml is None:
        raise ContractError("YAML support is unavailable")
    return yaml.safe_dump(value, sort_keys=False, allow_unicode=True)


def repository_relative(root: Path, path: Path) -> str:
    resolved_root = root.resolve()
    resolved_path = path.resolve()
    try:
        return resolved_path.relative_to(resolved_root).as_posix()
    except ValueError as exc:
        raise SecurityViolation(
            f"path escapes project root: {path}", details={"path": str(path), "root": str(root)}
        ) from exc


def resolve_declared_path(root: Path, value: str) -> Path:
    if not value or Path(value).is_absolute():
        raise SecurityViolation(f"absolute or empty path is forbidden: {value!r}")
    candidate = (root / value).resolve()
    repository_relative(root, candidate)
    return candidate


def iter_paths(root: Path, values: Sequence[str]) -> list[Path]:
    found: set[Path] = set()
    for value in values:
        if any(character in value for character in "*?["):
            for path in root.glob(value):
                if path.is_file():
                    repository_relative(root, path)
                    found.add(path.resolve())
        else:
            path = resolve_declared_path(root, value)
            if path.is_file():
                found.add(path)
            elif path.is_dir():
                for child in path.rglob("*"):
                    if child.is_file():
                        found.add(child.resolve())
            else:
                raise ContractError(f"declared input does not exist: {value}")
    return sorted(found, key=lambda path: repository_relative(root, path))


def input_record(root: Path, path: Path, kind: str = "source") -> dict[str, Any]:
    data = path.read_bytes()
    return {
        "path": repository_relative(root, path),
        "kind": kind,
        "sha256": sha256_bytes(data),
        "size": len(data),
    }


def source_ref(root: Path, path: Path, *, line: int | None = None, symbol: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
    ref: dict[str, Any] = {"path": repository_relative(root, path)}
    if line is not None:
        ref["line"] = line
    if symbol:
        ref["symbol"] = symbol
    return ref


def diagnostic(
    code: str,
    severity: str,
    message: str,
    *,
    capability_id: str | None = None,
    location: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
    details: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    result: dict[str, Any] = {
        "diagnostic_id": stable_id("diagnostic", code, capability_id or "", message, canonicalize(location or {})),
        "code": code,
        "severity": severity,
        "message": message,
    }
    if capability_id:
        result["capability_id"] = capability_id
    if location:
        result["location"] = canonicalize(dict(location))
    if details:
        result["details"] = canonicalize(dict(details))
    return result


def capability_result(
    capability_id: str,
    status: str,
    precision: str,
    *,
    required: bool = False,
    enforcement: str = "Invariant",
    mode: str = "static",
    diagnostic_ids: Sequence[str] = (),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if status not in RESULT_STATUSES:
        raise ContractError(f"invalid capability result status: {status}")
    if enforcement not in ENFORCEMENTS:
        raise ContractError(f"invalid enforcement: {enforcement}")
    if mode not in MODES:
        raise ContractError(f"invalid adapter mode: {mode}")
    return {
        "capability_id": capability_id,
        "required": bool(required),
        "status": status,
        "precision": precision,
        "enforcement": enforcement,
        "mode": mode,
        "diagnostic_ids": sorted(set(diagnostic_ids)),
    }


def evidence(
    root: Path,
    path: Path,
    *,
    authority: str,
    precision: str,
    adapter_id: str,
    adapter_version: str,
    line: int | None = None,
    symbol: str | None = None,
    pointer: str | None = None,
    mode: str = "static",
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if authority not in AUTHORITY_RANK:
        raise ContractError(f"invalid authority: {authority}")
    result: dict[str, Any] = {
        "evidence_id": stable_id(
            "evidence",
            repository_relative(root, path),
            line or "",
            symbol or "",
            pointer or "",
            authority,
            precision,
        ),
        "authority": authority,
        "precision": precision,
        "mode": mode,
        "source": source_ref(root, path, line=line, symbol=symbol),
        "input_sha256": sha256_bytes(path.read_bytes()),
        "adapter": {"id": adapter_id, "version": adapter_version},
    }
    if pointer:
        result["source"]["pointer"] = pointer
    return result


def make_fact(
    project_id: str,
    kind: str,
    natural_key: str,
    capability_id: str,
    value: Mapping[str, Any],
    evidence_items: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any]],
    *,
    fact_type: str = "node",
    requirement_refs: Sequence[str] = (),
    test_refs: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any] | str] = (),
    external_evidence_refs: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any] | str] = (),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if "." not in kind:
        raise ContractError(f"fact kind must be namespaced: {kind}")
    return {
        "fact_id": stable_id("fact", project_id, kind, natural_key),
        "fact_type": fact_type,
        "kind": kind,
        "natural_key": natural_key,
        "capability_id": capability_id,
        "value": canonicalize(dict(value)),
        "evidence": sorted((canonicalize(dict(item)) for item in evidence_items), key=canonical_json_bytes),
        "requirement_refs": sorted(set(requirement_refs)),
        "test_refs": canonicalize(list(test_refs)),
        "external_evidence_refs": canonicalize(list(external_evidence_refs)),
    }


def make_relation(
    project_id: str,
    kind: str,
    natural_key: str,
    capability_id: str,
    from_fact_id: str,
    to_fact_id: str,
    evidence_items: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any]],
    *,
    properties: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if "." not in kind:
        raise ContractError(f"relation kind must be namespaced: {kind}")
    return {
        "relation_id": stable_id("relation", project_id, kind, natural_key),
        "kind": kind,
        "natural_key": natural_key,
        "capability_id": capability_id,
        "from_fact_id": from_fact_id,
        "to_fact_id": to_fact_id,
        "properties": canonicalize(dict(properties or {})),
        "evidence": sorted((canonicalize(dict(item)) for item in evidence_items), key=canonical_json_bytes),
    }


def _walk_strings(value: Any, pointer: str = "$") -> Iterable[tuple[str, str]]:
    if isinstance(value, str):
        yield pointer, value
    elif isinstance(value, Mapping):
        for key, item in value.items():
            yield from _walk_strings(item, f"{pointer}/{key}")
    elif isinstance(value, Sequence) and not isinstance(value, (bytes, bytearray, str)):
        for index, item in enumerate(value):
            yield from _walk_strings(item, f"{pointer}/{index}")


def secret_findings(value: Any, known_values: Sequence[str] = ()) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
    findings: list[dict[str, str]] = []
    normalized_known = [item for item in known_values if item and len(item) >= 4]
    for pointer, text in _walk_strings(value):
        for secret in normalized_known:
            if secret in text:
                findings.append({"pointer": pointer, "kind": "known-value", "fingerprint": sha256_bytes(secret.encode())[:12]})
        for pattern in SECRET_PATTERNS:
            match = pattern.search(text)
            if match:
                findings.append(
                    {
                        "pointer": pointer,
                        "kind": "pattern",
                        "fingerprint": sha256_bytes(match.group(0).encode())[:12],
                    }
                )
    return sorted(findings, key=lambda item: (item["pointer"], item["kind"], item["fingerprint"]))


def reject_secrets(value: Any, known_values: Sequence[str] = ()) -> None:
    findings = secret_findings(value, known_values)
    if findings:
        raise SecurityViolation(
            "secret-bearing output was rejected before persistence",
            details={"findings": findings},
        )


def validate_source_locator(locator: Mapping[str, Any]) -> None:
    path = locator.get("path")
    if not isinstance(path, str) or not path or Path(path).is_absolute() or ".." in Path(path).parts:
        raise ContractError(f"invalid repository-relative source locator: {path!r}")
    if "line" in locator and (not isinstance(locator["line"], int) or locator["line"] < 1):
        raise ContractError(f"invalid source line: {locator['line']!r}")


def validate_ir(ir: Mapping[str, Any], profile_ids: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> None:
    required = {"schema_version", "project_id", "profile_ids", "facts", "relations", "capability_results", "diagnostics"}
    missing = sorted(required - set(ir))
    if missing:
        raise ContractError(f"IR missing required fields: {missing}")
    if ir["schema_version"] != IR_SCHEMA_VERSION:
        raise ContractError(f"unsupported IR schema version: {ir['schema_version']!r}")
    if not isinstance(ir["project_id"], str) or not ir["project_id"]:
        raise ContractError("project_id must be a non-empty string")
    profiles = list(profile_ids or ir["profile_ids"])
    allowed_prefixes = {"backend": "backend.", "frontend": "frontend.", "infrastructure": "infra.", "batch": "batch.", "system": "system.", "legacy": "legacy."}
    fact_ids: set[str] = set()
    for fact in ir["facts"]:
        for key in ("fact_id", "fact_type", "kind", "natural_key", "capability_id", "value", "evidence"):
            if key not in fact:
                raise ContractError(f"fact missing {key}: {fact}")
        if fact["fact_id"] in fact_ids:
            raise ContractError(f"duplicate fact_id: {fact['fact_id']}")
        fact_ids.add(fact["fact_id"])
        prefix = fact["kind"].split(".", 1)[0] + "."
        if prefix not in set(allowed_prefixes.values()):
            raise ContractError(f"unrecognized fact namespace: {fact['kind']}")
        if profiles and fact["kind"].startswith(("backend.", "frontend.", "infra.", "batch.")):
            matching = [name for name in profiles if allowed_prefixes.get(name) and fact["kind"].startswith(allowed_prefixes[name])]
            if not matching:
                raise ContractError(f"fact kind {fact['kind']} is outside profiles {profiles}")
        for item in fact["evidence"]:
            if item.get("authority") not in AUTHORITY_RANK:
                raise ContractError(f"invalid evidence authority: {item.get('authority')}")
            validate_source_locator(item.get("source", {}))
    relation_ids: set[str] = set()
    for relation in ir["relations"]:
        relation_id = relation.get("relation_id")
        if not relation_id or relation_id in relation_ids:
            raise ContractError(f"missing or duplicate relation_id: {relation_id}")
        relation_ids.add(relation_id)
        if relation.get("from_fact_id") not in fact_ids or relation.get("to_fact_id") not in fact_ids:
            raise ContractError(f"relation has unresolved exact endpoint: {relation_id}")
    for result in ir["capability_results"]:
        if result.get("status") not in RESULT_STATUSES:
            raise ContractError(f"invalid capability status: {result}")
        if result.get("mode") not in MODES:
            raise ContractError(f"invalid capability mode: {result}")
    diagnostic_ids: set[str] = set()
    for item in ir["diagnostics"]:
        if item.get("diagnostic_id") in diagnostic_ids:
            raise ContractError(f"duplicate diagnostic_id: {item.get('diagnostic_id')}")
        diagnostic_ids.add(item.get("diagnostic_id"))
    migrations = ir.get("identity_migrations", [])
    for migration in migrations:
        if migration.get("old_fact_id") == migration.get("new_fact_id"):
            raise ContractError("identity migration must change fact_id")
        if not migration.get("reason") or not migration.get("evidence"):
            raise ContractError("identity migration requires reason and evidence")


def validate_adapter_fragment(fragment: Mapping[str, Any]) -> None:
    if fragment.get("protocol_version") != PROTOCOL_VERSION:
        raise ContractError(f"adapter protocol mismatch: {fragment.get('protocol_version')!r}")
    adapter = fragment.get("adapter", {})
    if not adapter.get("id") or not adapter.get("version") or adapter.get("mode") not in MODES:
        raise ContractError(f"invalid adapter identity or mode: {adapter}")
    for key in ("facts", "relations", "capability_results", "diagnostics", "inputs"):
        if not isinstance(fragment.get(key), list):
            raise ContractError(f"adapter response field {key} must be an array")


def validate_adapter_manifest(manifest: Mapping[str, Any]) -> None:
    if manifest.get("schema_version") != ADAPTER_MANIFEST_VERSION:
        raise ContractError("adapter manifest schema version mismatch")
    if not manifest.get("adapter_id") or not manifest.get("version"):
        raise ContractError("adapter manifest requires adapter_id and version")
    if manifest.get("support_lifecycle") not in LIFECYCLES:
        raise ContractError("invalid support lifecycle")
    if not manifest.get("modes") or not set(manifest["modes"]).issubset(MODES):
        raise ContractError("adapter manifest has invalid modes")
    sandbox = manifest.get("sandbox", {})
    for key in ("network", "production_credentials", "path_escape"):
        if key not in sandbox:
            raise ContractError(f"adapter sandbox declaration missing {key}")


def validate_support_registry(registry: Mapping[str, Any]) -> None:
    if registry.get("schema_version") != SUPPORT_REGISTRY_VERSION:
        raise ContractError("support registry schema version mismatch")
    for entry in registry.get("entries", []):
        lifecycle = entry.get("support_lifecycle")
        if lifecycle not in LIFECYCLES:
            raise ContractError(f"invalid lifecycle in support registry: {lifecycle}")
        if lifecycle == "supported":
            evidence_map = entry.get("conformance_evidence", {})
            layers = set(evidence_map.get("layers", []))
            required_layers = set(range(1, 10))
            if layers != required_layers or not evidence_map.get("real_toolchain"):
                raise ContractError(
                    f"supported adapter {entry.get('adapter_id')} lacks all nine layers or real-toolchain evidence"
                )
            if not evidence_map.get("workflow") or not evidence_map.get("scope"):
                raise ContractError("supported adapter evidence requires workflow and explicit scope")


def required_capability_failures(ir: Mapping[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    return [
        result
        for result in ir.get("capability_results", [])
        if result.get("required") and result.get("status") in FAIL_CLOSED_STATUSES
    ]


def normalized_environment() -> dict[str, str]:
    return {
        "LANG": "C.UTF-8",
        "LC_ALL": "C.UTF-8",
        "TZ": "UTC",
        "SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH": "0",
        "PYTHONHASHSEED": "0",
    }


class Adapter:
    adapter_id = "adapter"
    version = "1.0.0"
    default_mode = "static"

    def extract(self, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:  # pragma: no cover - interface
        raise NotImplementedError

    def _identity(self, mode: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return {"id": self.adapter_id, "version": self.version, "mode": mode or self.default_mode}


class FastAPIAstAdapter(Adapter):
    adapter_id = "fastapi-python"

    def extract(self, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        mode = str(context.adapter_config.get("mode", self.default_mode))
        paths = iter_paths(context.root, context.adapter_config.get("inputs", ["**/*.py"]))
        facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        relations: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        route_unknown = False
        for path in paths:
            try:
                tree = ast.parse(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), filename=path.as_posix())
            except (SyntaxError, UnicodeDecodeError) as exc:
                diagnostics.append(
                    diagnostic(
                        "PYTHON_PARSE_ERROR",
                        "error",
                        str(exc),
                        capability_id="backend.routes",
                        location=source_ref(context.root, path, line=getattr(exc, "lineno", None)),
                    )
                )
                route_unknown = True
                continue
            for node in ast.walk(tree):
                if not isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef)):
                    continue
                for decorator in node.decorator_list:
                    call = decorator if isinstance(decorator, ast.Call) else None
                    attr = call.func if call and isinstance(call.func, ast.Attribute) else None
                    method = attr.attr.lower() if attr else ""
                    if method not in HTTP_METHODS:
                        continue
                    path_value: str | None = None
                    if call.args and isinstance(call.args[0], ast.Constant) and isinstance(call.args[0].value, str):
                        path_value = call.args[0].value
                    elif any(keyword.arg in {"path", "route"} and isinstance(keyword.value, ast.Constant) and isinstance(keyword.value.value, str) for keyword in call.keywords):
                        path_value = next(
                            keyword.value.value
                            for keyword in call.keywords
                            if keyword.arg in {"path", "route"}
                            and isinstance(keyword.value, ast.Constant)
                            and isinstance(keyword.value.value, str)
                        )
                    operation_id = node.name
                    for keyword in call.keywords:
                        if keyword.arg == "operation_id" and isinstance(keyword.value, ast.Constant) and isinstance(keyword.value.value, str):
                            operation_id = keyword.value.value
                    if path_value is None:
                        item = diagnostic(
                            "ROUTE_DYNAMIC_UNRESOLVED",
                            "error",
                            f"route path for {node.name} is not a literal",
                            capability_id="backend.routes",
                            location=source_ref(context.root, path, line=node.lineno, symbol=node.name),
                        )
                        diagnostics.append(item)
                        route_unknown = True
                        continue
                    ev = evidence(
                        context.root,
                        path,
                        authority="source",
                        precision="semantic-static-derived",
                        adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                        adapter_version=self.version,
                        line=node.lineno,
                        symbol=node.name,
                        mode=mode,
                    )
                    operation = make_fact(
                        context.project_id,
                        "backend.operation",
                        operation_id,
                        "backend.routes",
                        {
                            "method": method.upper(),
                            "path": path_value,
                            "operation_id": operation_id,
                            "handler": node.name,
                        },
                        [ev],
                    )
                    facts.append(operation)
                    calls = [
                        child
                        for child in ast.walk(node)
                        if isinstance(child, ast.Call) and getattr(child, "lineno", 0) > node.lineno
                    ]
                    calls.sort(key=lambda child: (getattr(child, "lineno", 0), getattr(child, "col_offset", 0)))
                    for index, child in enumerate(calls, start=1):
                        call_name = _ast_call_name(child.func)
                        if not call_name or call_name in {"Depends", "HTTPException"}:
                            continue
                        step_ev = evidence(
                            context.root,
                            path,
                            authority="source",
                            precision="handler-direct-exact",
                            adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                            adapter_version=self.version,
                            line=child.lineno,
                            symbol=call_name,
                            mode=mode,
                        )
                        step = make_fact(
                            context.project_id,
                            "backend.flow-step",
                            f"{operation_id}:{index}:{call_name}",
                            "backend.flow",
                            {"operation_id": operation_id, "order": index, "call": call_name},
                            [step_ev],
                            fact_type="property",
                        )
                        facts.append(step)
                        relations.append(
                            make_relation(
                                context.project_id,
                                "backend.contains-step",
                                f"{operation_id}:{step['fact_id']}",
                                "backend.flow",
                                operation["fact_id"],
                                step["fact_id"],
                                [step_ev],
                                properties={"order": index},
                            )
                        )
        route_diags = [item["diagnostic_id"] for item in diagnostics if item.get("capability_id") == "backend.routes"]
        return AdapterFragment(
            adapter=self._identity(mode),
            facts=facts,
            relations=relations,
            capability_results=[
                capability_result(
                    "backend.routes",
                    "unknown" if route_unknown else ("derived" if facts else "not_applicable"),
                    "semantic-static-derived" if facts else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("required", True)),
                    mode=mode,
                    diagnostic_ids=route_diags,
                ),
                capability_result(
                    "backend.flow",
                    "derived" if any(fact["kind"] == "backend.flow-step" for fact in facts) else "not_applicable",
                    "handler-direct-exact" if any(fact["kind"] == "backend.flow-step" for fact in facts) else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("flow_required", False)),
                    mode=mode,
                ),
            ],
            diagnostics=diagnostics,
            inputs=[input_record(context.root, path) for path in paths],
        )


def _ast_call_name(node: ast.AST) -> str:
    if isinstance(node, ast.Name):
        return node.id
    if isinstance(node, ast.Attribute):
        prefix = _ast_call_name(node.value)
        return f"{prefix}.{node.attr}" if prefix else node.attr
    return ""


class OpenAPIAdapter(Adapter):
    adapter_id = "openapi"
    default_mode = "executable-contract"

    def extract(self, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        mode = str(context.adapter_config.get("mode", self.default_mode))
        paths = iter_paths(context.root, context.adapter_config.get("inputs", ["**/openapi.json", "**/openapi.yaml", "**/openapi.yml"]))
        facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for path in paths:
            document = load_data(path) or {}
            version = str(document.get("openapi", ""))
            if not version.startswith("3."):
                diagnostics.append(
                    diagnostic(
                        "OPENAPI_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED",
                        "error",
                        f"OpenAPI version {version!r} is unsupported",
                        capability_id="backend.http-contract",
                        location=source_ref(context.root, path),
                    )
                )
                continue
            for route_path, path_item in sorted((document.get("paths") or {}).items()):
                if not isinstance(path_item, Mapping):
                    continue
                for method, operation in sorted(path_item.items()):
                    if method.lower() not in HTTP_METHODS or not isinstance(operation, Mapping):
                        continue
                    operation_id = str(operation.get("operationId") or f"{method.lower()}:{route_path}")
                    ev = evidence(
                        context.root,
                        path,
                        authority="artifact",
                        precision="openapi-exact",
                        adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                        adapter_version=self.version,
                        pointer=f"/paths/{_json_pointer_escape(route_path)}/{method}",
                        mode=mode,
                    )
                    responses = sorted(str(status) for status in (operation.get("responses") or {}))
                    facts.append(
                        make_fact(
                            context.project_id,
                            "backend.operation",
                            operation_id,
                            "backend.http-contract",
                            {
                                "method": method.upper(),
                                "path": route_path,
                                "operation_id": operation_id,
                                "responses": responses,
                                "request_body": bool(operation.get("requestBody")),
                                "parameters": canonicalize(operation.get("parameters") or []),
                            },
                            [ev],
                        )
                    )
            schemas = ((document.get("components") or {}).get("schemas") or {})
            for name, schema in sorted(schemas.items()):
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="artifact",
                    precision="openapi-exact",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    pointer=f"/components/schemas/{_json_pointer_escape(name)}",
                    mode=mode,
                )
                facts.append(
                    make_fact(
                        context.project_id,
                        "backend.schema",
                        name,
                        "backend.http-schema",
                        {"name": name, "schema": canonicalize(schema)},
                        [ev],
                    )
                )
        status = "exact" if facts and not diagnostics else ("unknown" if diagnostics else "not_applicable")
        return AdapterFragment(
            adapter=self._identity(mode),
            facts=facts,
            relations=[],
            capability_results=[
                capability_result(
                    "backend.http-contract",
                    status,
                    "openapi-exact" if facts else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("required", True)),
                    mode=mode,
                    diagnostic_ids=[item["diagnostic_id"] for item in diagnostics],
                )
            ],
            diagnostics=diagnostics,
            inputs=[input_record(context.root, path, "executable-contract") for path in paths],
        )


def _json_pointer_escape(value: str) -> str:
    return value.replace("~", "~0").replace("/", "~1")


class SQLAdapter(Adapter):
    adapter_id = "ddl-sql"

    CREATE_TABLE = re.compile(
        r"CREATE\s+TABLE\s+(?:IF\s+NOT\s+EXISTS\s+)?(?P<name>[A-Za-z_][\w.]*)\s*\((?P<body>.*?)\)\s*;",
        re.IGNORECASE | re.DOTALL,
    )
    QUERY = re.compile(r"\b(SELECT|INSERT\s+INTO|UPDATE|DELETE\s+FROM)\s+([A-Za-z_][\w.]*)", re.IGNORECASE)

    def extract(self, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        mode = str(context.adapter_config.get("mode", self.default_mode))
        paths = iter_paths(context.root, context.adapter_config.get("inputs", ["**/*.sql"]))
        facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for path in paths:
            text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
            for match in self.CREATE_TABLE.finditer(text):
                name = match.group("name")
                line = text.count("\n", 0, match.start()) + 1
                columns: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
                for raw_column in _split_sql_columns(match.group("body")):
                    tokens = raw_column.strip().split()
                    if len(tokens) < 2 or tokens[0].upper() in {"PRIMARY", "FOREIGN", "UNIQUE", "CONSTRAINT", "CHECK"}:
                        continue
                    columns.append(
                        {
                            "name": tokens[0].strip('"`[]'),
                            "type": tokens[1].upper(),
                            "nullable": "NOT NULL" not in raw_column.upper(),
                            "primary_key": "PRIMARY KEY" in raw_column.upper(),
                        }
                    )
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="artifact",
                    precision="table-exact",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    line=line,
                    symbol=name,
                    mode=mode,
                )
                facts.append(
                    make_fact(
                        context.project_id,
                        "backend.table",
                        name,
                        "backend.data-schema",
                        {"name": name, "columns": columns},
                        [ev],
                    )
                )
            for index, match in enumerate(self.QUERY.finditer(text), start=1):
                verb = match.group(1).upper().split()[0]
                table = match.group(2)
                line = text.count("\n", 0, match.start()) + 1
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="source",
                    precision="query-exact",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    line=line,
                    symbol=f"query-{index}",
                    mode=mode,
                )
                facts.append(
                    make_fact(
                        context.project_id,
                        "backend.query",
                        f"{repository_relative(context.root, path)}:{line}:{verb}:{table}",
                        "backend.data-access",
                        {"operation": verb, "table": table, "statement_sha256": sha256_bytes(match.group(0).encode())},
                        [ev],
                        fact_type="property",
                    )
                )
        return AdapterFragment(
            adapter=self._identity(mode),
            facts=facts,
            relations=[],
            capability_results=[
                capability_result(
                    "backend.data-schema",
                    "exact" if any(fact["kind"] == "backend.table" for fact in facts) else "not_applicable",
                    "table-exact" if any(fact["kind"] == "backend.table" for fact in facts) else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("schema_required", False)),
                    mode=mode,
                ),
                capability_result(
                    "backend.data-access",
                    "exact" if any(fact["kind"] == "backend.query" for fact in facts) else "not_applicable",
                    "query-exact" if any(fact["kind"] == "backend.query" for fact in facts) else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("query_required", False)),
                    mode=mode,
                ),
            ],
            diagnostics=[],
            inputs=[input_record(context.root, path, "artifact") for path in paths],
        )


def _split_sql_columns(value: str) -> list[str]:
    parts: list[str] = []
    current: list[str] = []
    depth = 0
    quote: str | None = None
    for character in value:
        if quote:
            current.append(character)
            if character == quote:
                quote = None
            continue
        if character in {"'", '"', "`"}:
            quote = character
            current.append(character)
        elif character == "(":
            depth += 1
            current.append(character)
        elif character == ")":
            depth = max(depth - 1, 0)
            current.append(character)
        elif character == "," and depth == 0:
            parts.append("".join(current))
            current = []
        else:
            current.append(character)
    if current:
        parts.append("".join(current))
    return parts


class CloudFormationAdapter(Adapter):
    adapter_id = "cloudformation"
    default_mode = "build"

    def extract(self, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        mode = str(context.adapter_config.get("mode", self.default_mode))
        paths = iter_paths(context.root, context.adapter_config.get("inputs", ["**/template.json", "**/template.yaml", "**/template.yml"]))
        facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        relations: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        fact_by_logical_id: dict[str, str] = {}
        for path in paths:
            template = load_data(path) or {}
            resources = template.get("Resources") or {}
            for logical_id, resource_value in sorted(resources.items()):
                resource_value = resource_value or {}
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="artifact",
                    precision="cloudformation-exact",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    pointer=f"/Resources/{_json_pointer_escape(logical_id)}",
                    mode=mode,
                )
                properties = _sanitize_cloudformation_value(resource_value.get("Properties") or {})
                fact = make_fact(
                    context.project_id,
                    "infra.resource",
                    logical_id,
                    "infra.resources",
                    {
                        "logical_id": logical_id,
                        "resource_type": resource_value.get("Type"),
                        "properties": properties,
                        "deletion_policy": resource_value.get("DeletionPolicy"),
                        "update_replace_policy": resource_value.get("UpdateReplacePolicy"),
                    },
                    [ev],
                )
                facts.append(fact)
                fact_by_logical_id[logical_id] = fact["fact_id"]
            for name, parameter in sorted((template.get("Parameters") or {}).items()):
                parameter = parameter or {}
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="artifact",
                    precision="cloudformation-exact",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    pointer=f"/Parameters/{_json_pointer_escape(name)}",
                    mode=mode,
                )
                value = {
                    "name": name,
                    "type": parameter.get("Type"),
                    "no_echo": bool(parameter.get("NoEcho")),
                    "allowed_values": parameter.get("AllowedValues"),
                }
                if not parameter.get("NoEcho") and "Default" in parameter:
                    value["default"] = parameter["Default"]
                elif parameter.get("NoEcho"):
                    value["secret_reference"] = {"kind": "cloudformation-parameter", "logical_locator": name}
                facts.append(
                    make_fact(
                        context.project_id,
                        "infra.parameter",
                        name,
                        "infra.parameters",
                        value,
                        [ev],
                    )
                )
            for logical_id, resource_value in sorted(resources.items()):
                from_id = fact_by_logical_id.get(logical_id)
                if not from_id:
                    continue
                targets = set(_collect_cfn_refs(resource_value))
                depends_on = resource_value.get("DependsOn") if isinstance(resource_value, Mapping) else None
                if isinstance(depends_on, str):
                    targets.add(depends_on)
                elif isinstance(depends_on, list):
                    targets.update(str(item) for item in depends_on)
                for target in sorted(targets):
                    to_id = fact_by_logical_id.get(target)
                    if not to_id:
                        continue
                    ev = evidence(
                        context.root,
                        path,
                        authority="artifact",
                        precision="cloudformation-exact",
                        adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                        adapter_version=self.version,
                        pointer=f"/Resources/{_json_pointer_escape(logical_id)}",
                        mode=mode,
                    )
                    relations.append(
                        make_relation(
                            context.project_id,
                            "infra.depends-on",
                            f"{logical_id}:{target}",
                            "infra.dependencies",
                            from_id,
                            to_id,
                            [ev],
                        )
                    )
        return AdapterFragment(
            adapter=self._identity(mode),
            facts=facts,
            relations=relations,
            capability_results=[
                capability_result(
                    "infra.resources",
                    "exact" if any(fact["kind"] == "infra.resource" for fact in facts) else "not_applicable",
                    "cloudformation-exact" if facts else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("required", True)),
                    mode=mode,
                ),
                capability_result(
                    "infra.parameters",
                    "exact" if any(fact["kind"] == "infra.parameter" for fact in facts) else "not_applicable",
                    "cloudformation-exact" if any(fact["kind"] == "infra.parameter" for fact in facts) else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("parameters_required", False)),
                    mode=mode,
                ),
                capability_result(
                    "infra.dependencies",
                    "exact" if relations else "not_applicable",
                    "cloudformation-exact" if relations else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("dependencies_required", False)),
                    mode=mode,
                ),
            ],
            diagnostics=diagnostics,
            inputs=[input_record(context.root, path, "build-artifact") for path in paths],
        )


def _sanitize_cloudformation_value(value: Any, key: str = "") -> Any:
    if isinstance(value, Mapping):
        result: dict[str, Any] = {}
        for child_key, child_value in sorted(value.items()):
            normalized_key = str(child_key)
            if re.search(r"(?i)(password|secret|token|api.?key)", normalized_key):
                result[normalized_key] = {
                    "kind": "secret-reference",
                    "logical_locator": _logical_secret_locator(child_value),
                }
            else:
                result[normalized_key] = _sanitize_cloudformation_value(child_value, normalized_key)
        return result
    if isinstance(value, list):
        return [_sanitize_cloudformation_value(item, key) for item in value]
    return value


def _logical_secret_locator(value: Any) -> str:
    if isinstance(value, Mapping):
        if "Ref" in value:
            return f"Ref:{value['Ref']}"
        if "Fn::Sub" in value:
            return "Fn::Sub"
        return "intrinsic"
    return "redacted-literal"


def _collect_cfn_refs(value: Any) -> Iterable[str]:
    if isinstance(value, Mapping):
        if set(value) == {"Ref"} and isinstance(value["Ref"], str):
            yield value["Ref"]
        if "Fn::GetAtt" in value:
            target = value["Fn::GetAtt"]
            if isinstance(target, list) and target:
                yield str(target[0])
            elif isinstance(target, str):
                yield target.split(".", 1)[0]
        for child in value.values():
            yield from _collect_cfn_refs(child)
    elif isinstance(value, list):
        for child in value:
            yield from _collect_cfn_refs(child)


class RegexFrameworkAdapter(Adapter):
    framework = "generic"
    namespace = "backend"

    def extract(self, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        mode = str(context.adapter_config.get("mode", self.default_mode))
        paths = iter_paths(context.root, context.adapter_config.get("inputs", []))
        facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for path in paths:
            extracted, unresolved = self._routes(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            for method, route_path, operation_id, line in extracted:
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="source",
                    precision="semantic-static-derived",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    line=line,
                    symbol=operation_id,
                    mode=mode,
                )
                facts.append(
                    make_fact(
                        context.project_id,
                        "backend.operation",
                        operation_id,
                        "backend.routes",
                        {"method": method, "path": route_path, "operation_id": operation_id, "handler": operation_id},
                        [ev],
                    )
                )
            for line, detail in unresolved:
                diagnostics.append(
                    diagnostic(
                        "ROUTE_DYNAMIC_UNRESOLVED",
                        "error",
                        detail,
                        capability_id="backend.routes",
                        location=source_ref(context.root, path, line=line),
                    )
                )
        status = "unknown" if diagnostics else ("derived" if facts else "not_applicable")
        return AdapterFragment(
            adapter=self._identity(mode),
            facts=facts,
            relations=[],
            capability_results=[
                capability_result(
                    "backend.routes",
                    status,
                    "semantic-static-derived" if facts else "not-applicable",
                    required=bool(context.adapter_config.get("required", True)),
                    mode=mode,
                    diagnostic_ids=[item["diagnostic_id"] for item in diagnostics],
                )
            ],
            diagnostics=diagnostics,
            inputs=[input_record(context.root, path) for path in paths],
        )

    def _routes(self, text: str) -> tuple[list[tuple[str, str, str, int]], list[tuple[int, str]]]:
        raise NotImplementedError


class SpringMvcAdapter(RegexFrameworkAdapter):
    adapter_id = "spring-boot-mvc"

    def _routes(self, text: str) -> tuple[list[tuple[str, str, str, int]], list[tuple[int, str]]]:
        routes: list[tuple[str, str, str, int]] = []
        unresolved: list[tuple[int, str]] = []
        base = ""
        base_match = re.search(r"@RequestMapping\(\s*\"([^\"]*)\"\s*\)", text)
        if base_match:
            base = base_match.group(1)
        pattern = re.compile(r"@(Get|Post|Put|Patch|Delete)Mapping\(\s*([^)]*)\)\s*(?:public\s+)?[\w<>?, ]+\s+(\w+)\s*\(", re.MULTILINE)
        for match in pattern.finditer(text):
            argument = match.group(2).strip()
            line = text.count("\n", 0, match.start()) + 1
            literal = re.fullmatch(r"(?:value\s*=\s*)?\"([^\"]*)\"", argument)
            if not literal:
                unresolved.append((line, f"Spring mapping for {match.group(3)} is not a literal"))
                continue
            routes.append((match.group(1).upper(), _join_route(base, literal.group(1)), match.group(3), line))
        if "registerMapping(" in text:
            line = text[: text.index("registerMapping(")].count("\n") + 1
            unresolved.append((line, "programmatic registerMapping cannot be resolved statically"))
        return routes, unresolved


class NestJsAdapter(RegexFrameworkAdapter):
    adapter_id = "nestjs"

    def _routes(self, text: str) -> tuple[list[tuple[str, str, str, int]], list[tuple[int, str]]]:
        routes: list[tuple[str, str, str, int]] = []
        unresolved: list[tuple[int, str]] = []
        base_match = re.search(r"@Controller\(\s*(['\"])(.*?)\1\s*\)", text)
        base = base_match.group(2) if base_match else ""
        if "@Controller(" in text and not base_match:
            line = text[: text.index("@Controller(")].count("\n") + 1
            unresolved.append((line, "computed NestJS controller path cannot be resolved"))
        pattern = re.compile(r"@(Get|Post|Put|Patch|Delete)\(\s*([^)]*)\)\s*(\w+)\s*\(", re.MULTILINE)
        for match in pattern.finditer(text):
            argument = match.group(2).strip()
            line = text.count("\n", 0, match.start()) + 1
            literal = re.fullmatch(r"(['\"])(.*?)\1", argument)
            if not literal:
                unresolved.append((line, f"computed NestJS route for {match.group(3)} cannot be resolved"))
                continue
            routes.append((match.group(1).upper(), _join_route(base, literal.group(2)), match.group(3), line))
        return routes, unresolved


class RailsAdapter(RegexFrameworkAdapter):
    adapter_id = "rails"

    def _routes(self, text: str) -> tuple[list[tuple[str, str, str, int]], list[tuple[int, str]]]:
        routes: list[tuple[str, str, str, int]] = []
        unresolved: list[tuple[int, str]] = []
        pattern = re.compile(r"\b(get|post|put|patch|delete)\s+(['\"])(.*?)\2\s*,\s*to:\s*(['\"])(.*?)\4")
        for match in pattern.finditer(text):
            line = text.count("\n", 0, match.start()) + 1
            action = match.group(5).split("#")[-1]
            routes.append((match.group(1).upper(), match.group(3).replace(":id", "{id}"), action, line))
        if re.search(r"\bresources\s+[A-Za-z_]", text):
            match = re.search(r"\bresources\s+[A-Za-z_]", text)
            unresolved.append((text.count("\n", 0, match.start()) + 1, "dynamic Rails resources declaration cannot be resolved"))
        return routes, unresolved


class GinAdapter(RegexFrameworkAdapter):
    adapter_id = "gin"

    def _routes(self, text: str) -> tuple[list[tuple[str, str, str, int]], list[tuple[int, str]]]:
        routes: list[tuple[str, str, str, int]] = []
        unresolved: list[tuple[int, str]] = []
        pattern = re.compile(r"\.\s*(GET|POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE)\(\s*([^,]+),\s*(\w+)")
        for match in pattern.finditer(text):
            line = text.count("\n", 0, match.start()) + 1
            literal = re.fullmatch(r"\s*\"([^\"]*)\"\s*", match.group(2))
            if not literal:
                unresolved.append((line, f"computed Gin route for {match.group(3)} cannot be resolved"))
                continue
            routes.append((match.group(1), literal.group(1).replace(":id", "{id}"), match.group(3), line))
        return routes, unresolved


def _join_route(base: str, child: str) -> str:
    parts = [part.strip("/") for part in (base, child) if part.strip("/")]
    return "/" + "/".join(parts) if parts else "/"


class FrontendManifestAdapter(Adapter):
    adapter_id = "frontend-manifest"
    default_mode = "build"

    def extract(self, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        mode = str(context.adapter_config.get("mode", self.default_mode))
        paths = iter_paths(context.root, context.adapter_config.get("inputs", ["**/frontend.design.json"]))
        facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        relations: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        by_external_id: dict[str, str] = {}
        for path in paths:
            document = load_data(path) or {}
            for route in document.get("routes", []):
                if not isinstance(route.get("path"), str):
                    diagnostics.append(
                        diagnostic(
                            "UI_ROUTE_UNRESOLVED",
                            "error",
                            "frontend route path is not exact",
                            capability_id="frontend.routes",
                            location=source_ref(context.root, path),
                        )
                    )
                    continue
                external_id = str(route.get("id") or route["path"])
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="artifact",
                    precision="build-artifact-exact",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    pointer=f"/routes/{_json_pointer_escape(external_id)}",
                    mode=mode,
                )
                fact = make_fact(
                    context.project_id,
                    "frontend.route",
                    external_id,
                    "frontend.routes",
                    {"external_id": external_id, "path": route["path"], "component": route.get("component")},
                    [ev],
                )
                facts.append(fact)
                by_external_id[external_id] = fact["fact_id"]
            sections = {
                "components": ("frontend.component", "frontend.components"),
                "api_operations": ("frontend.api-operation", "frontend.api-relations"),
                "states": ("frontend.state-scenario", "frontend.state-scenarios"),
                "assertions": ("frontend.accessibility-assertion", "frontend.accessibility"),
                "tokens": ("frontend.design-token", "frontend.tokens"),
                "responsive_rules": ("frontend.responsive-rule", "frontend.responsive"),
            }
            for section, (kind, capability_id) in sections.items():
                for index, item in enumerate(document.get(section, [])):
                    if isinstance(item, str):
                        item = {"id": item, "value": item}
                    external_id = str(item.get("id") or item.get("name") or f"{section}-{index}")
                    ev = evidence(
                        context.root,
                        path,
                        authority="executable-contract" if section in {"states", "assertions"} else "artifact",
                        precision="assertion-exact" if section in {"states", "assertions"} else "build-artifact-exact",
                        adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                        adapter_version=self.version,
                        pointer=f"/{section}/{index}",
                        mode="executable-contract" if section in {"states", "assertions"} else mode,
                    )
                    fact = make_fact(
                        context.project_id,
                        kind,
                        external_id,
                        capability_id,
                        {"external_id": external_id, **canonicalize(dict(item))},
                        [ev],
                        test_refs=item.get("test_refs", []),
                        requirement_refs=item.get("requirement_refs", []),
                    )
                    facts.append(fact)
                    by_external_id[external_id] = fact["fact_id"]
            for index, relation in enumerate(document.get("relations", [])):
                from_id = by_external_id.get(str(relation.get("from")))
                to_id = by_external_id.get(str(relation.get("to")))
                if not from_id or not to_id:
                    diagnostics.append(
                        diagnostic(
                            "UI_RELATION_ORPHAN",
                            "error",
                            f"frontend exact relation endpoint is missing: {relation}",
                            capability_id="frontend.relations",
                            location=source_ref(context.root, path),
                        )
                    )
                    continue
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="artifact",
                    precision="exact-mapping",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    pointer=f"/relations/{index}",
                    mode=mode,
                )
                relations.append(
                    make_relation(
                        context.project_id,
                        str(relation.get("kind") or "frontend.relates"),
                        f"{relation.get('from')}:{relation.get('to')}:{index}",
                        "frontend.relations",
                        from_id,
                        to_id,
                        [ev],
                    )
                )
        required_caps = set(context.adapter_config.get("required_capabilities", ["frontend.routes"]))
        capability_ids = sorted({fact["capability_id"] for fact in facts} | required_caps)
        results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for capability_id in capability_ids:
            matching = [fact for fact in facts if fact["capability_id"] == capability_id]
            matching_diags = [item for item in diagnostics if item.get("capability_id") == capability_id]
            status = "unknown" if matching_diags else ("exact" if matching else "not_applicable")
            results.append(
                capability_result(
                    capability_id,
                    status,
                    "build-artifact-exact" if matching else "not-applicable",
                    required=capability_id in required_caps,
                    mode=mode,
                    diagnostic_ids=[item["diagnostic_id"] for item in matching_diags],
                )
            )
        return AdapterFragment(
            adapter=self._identity(mode),
            facts=facts,
            relations=relations,
            capability_results=results,
            diagnostics=diagnostics,
            inputs=[input_record(context.root, path, "build-artifact") for path in paths],
        )


class BatchManifestAdapter(Adapter):
    adapter_id = "batch-workflow-manifest"
    default_mode = "build"

    def extract(self, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        mode = str(context.adapter_config.get("mode", self.default_mode))
        paths = iter_paths(context.root, context.adapter_config.get("inputs", ["**/batch.design.json"]))
        facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        relations: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        by_external_id: dict[str, str] = {}
        sections = {
            "jobs": ("batch.job", "batch.jobs"),
            "triggers": ("batch.trigger", "batch.triggers"),
            "steps": ("batch.step", "batch.flow"),
            "effects": ("batch.effect", "batch.effects"),
            "recovery": ("batch.recovery", "batch.recovery"),
            "tests": ("batch.test-scenario", "batch.verification"),
        }
        for path in paths:
            document = load_data(path) or {}
            for section, (kind, capability_id) in sections.items():
                for index, item in enumerate(document.get(section, [])):
                    if isinstance(item, str):
                        item = {"id": item, "value": item}
                    external_id = item.get("id")
                    if not external_id:
                        diagnostics.append(
                            diagnostic(
                                "BATCH_IDENTITY_MISSING",
                                "error",
                                f"{section} item lacks an explicit exact id",
                                capability_id=capability_id,
                                location=source_ref(context.root, path),
                            )
                        )
                        continue
                    ev = evidence(
                        context.root,
                        path,
                        authority="executable-contract" if section == "tests" else "artifact",
                        precision="assertion-exact" if section == "tests" else "workflow-artifact-exact",
                        adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                        adapter_version=self.version,
                        pointer=f"/{section}/{index}",
                        mode="executable-contract" if section == "tests" else mode,
                    )
                    fact = make_fact(
                        context.project_id,
                        kind,
                        str(external_id),
                        capability_id,
                        {"external_id": str(external_id), **canonicalize(dict(item))},
                        [ev],
                        requirement_refs=item.get("requirement_refs", []),
                        test_refs=item.get("test_refs", []),
                    )
                    facts.append(fact)
                    by_external_id[str(external_id)] = fact["fact_id"]
            for index, relation in enumerate(document.get("relations", [])):
                from_id = by_external_id.get(str(relation.get("from")))
                to_id = by_external_id.get(str(relation.get("to")))
                if not from_id or not to_id:
                    diagnostics.append(
                        diagnostic(
                            "BATCH_RELATION_ORPHAN",
                            "error",
                            f"batch exact relation endpoint is missing: {relation}",
                            capability_id="batch.flow",
                            location=source_ref(context.root, path),
                        )
                    )
                    continue
                ev = evidence(
                    context.root,
                    path,
                    authority="artifact",
                    precision="exact-mapping",
                    adapter_id=self.adapter_id,
                    adapter_version=self.version,
                    pointer=f"/relations/{index}",
                    mode=mode,
                )
                relations.append(
                    make_relation(
                        context.project_id,
                        str(relation.get("kind") or "batch.flows-to"),
                        f"{relation.get('from')}:{relation.get('to')}:{index}",
                        "batch.flow",
                        from_id,
                        to_id,
                        [ev],
                        properties={"order": relation.get("order")},
                    )
                )
        required_caps = set(context.adapter_config.get("required_capabilities", ["batch.jobs", "batch.triggers"]))
        results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for capability_id in sorted({fact["capability_id"] for fact in facts} | required_caps):
            matching = [fact for fact in facts if fact["capability_id"] == capability_id]
            matching_diags = [item for item in diagnostics if item.get("capability_id") == capability_id]
            results.append(
                capability_result(
                    capability_id,
                    "unknown" if matching_diags else ("exact" if matching else "not_applicable"),
                    "workflow-artifact-exact" if matching else "not-applicable",
                    required=capability_id in required_caps,
                    mode=mode,
                    diagnostic_ids=[item["diagnostic_id"] for item in matching_diags],
                )
            )
        return AdapterFragment(
            adapter=self._identity(mode),
            facts=facts,
            relations=relations,
            capability_results=results,
            diagnostics=diagnostics,
            inputs=[input_record(context.root, path, "build-artifact") for path in paths],
        )


ADAPTERS: dict[str, type[Adapter]] = {
    FastAPIAstAdapter.adapter_id: FastAPIAstAdapter,
    OpenAPIAdapter.adapter_id: OpenAPIAdapter,
    SQLAdapter.adapter_id: SQLAdapter,
    CloudFormationAdapter.adapter_id: CloudFormationAdapter,
    SpringMvcAdapter.adapter_id: SpringMvcAdapter,
    NestJsAdapter.adapter_id: NestJsAdapter,
    RailsAdapter.adapter_id: RailsAdapter,
    GinAdapter.adapter_id: GinAdapter,
    FrontendManifestAdapter.adapter_id: FrontendManifestAdapter,
    BatchManifestAdapter.adapter_id: BatchManifestAdapter,
}


def _resource_limiter(memory_mb: int, cpu_seconds: int, file_mb: int) -> Any:
    def apply() -> None:
        resource.setrlimit(resource.RLIMIT_AS, (memory_mb * 1024 * 1024, memory_mb * 1024 * 1024))
        resource.setrlimit(resource.RLIMIT_CPU, (cpu_seconds, cpu_seconds + 1))
        resource.setrlimit(resource.RLIMIT_FSIZE, (file_mb * 1024 * 1024, file_mb * 1024 * 1024))
        resource.setrlimit(resource.RLIMIT_NOFILE, (64, 64))
        if hasattr(os, "unshare") and hasattr(os, "CLONE_NEWNET"):
            try:
                os.unshare(os.CLONE_NEWNET)
            except PermissionError:
                pass
    return apply


class AdapterRunner:
    def __init__(self, *, timeout_seconds: int = 10, memory_mb: int = 128, output_bytes: int = 1_048_576):
        self.timeout_seconds = timeout_seconds
        self.memory_mb = memory_mb
        self.output_bytes = output_bytes

    def run_builtin(self, adapter_id: str, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        adapter_type = ADAPTERS.get(adapter_id)
        if adapter_type is None:
            raise ContractError(f"unknown built-in adapter: {adapter_id}")
        fragment = adapter_type().extract(context)
        payload = fragment.as_dict()
        validate_adapter_fragment(payload)
        reject_secrets(payload, _known_secret_values(context.adapter_config))
        return fragment

    def run_process(self, manifest_path: Path, context: AdapterContext) -> AdapterFragment:
        manifest = load_data(manifest_path)
        validate_adapter_manifest(manifest)
        if manifest.get("adapter_id") != context.adapter_config.get("id"):
            raise ContractError("process adapter id differs between config and manifest")
        root = context.root.resolve()
        declared_inputs = iter_paths(root, context.adapter_config.get("inputs", []))
        entrypoint = manifest.get("entrypoint")
        if not isinstance(entrypoint, list) or not entrypoint:
            raise ContractError("process adapter entrypoint must be a non-empty array")
        entry_script = resolve_declared_path(root, str(entrypoint[-1]))
        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="designflow-adapter-") as temporary:
            sandbox = Path(temporary)
            copied: dict[Path, Path] = {}
            for path in [entry_script, *declared_inputs]:
                relative = repository_relative(root, path)
                destination = sandbox / relative
                destination.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                shutil.copy2(path, destination)
                copied[path.resolve()] = destination
            command = list(entrypoint)
            if command[0] in {"python", "python3", sys.executable}:
                command[0] = sys.executable
            command[-1] = copied[entry_script.resolve()].relative_to(sandbox).as_posix()
            request = {
                "protocol_version": PROTOCOL_VERSION,
                "project_id": context.project_id,
                "profile_ids": list(context.profile_ids),
                "inputs": [input_record(root, path) for path in declared_inputs],
                "mode": context.adapter_config.get("mode", manifest["modes"][0]),
                "environment": normalized_environment(),
            }
            environment = {
                "PATH": os.environ.get("PATH", ""),
                "LANG": "C.UTF-8",
                "LC_ALL": "C.UTF-8",
                "TZ": "UTC",
                "SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH": "0",
                "PYTHONHASHSEED": "0",
                "HOME": sandbox.as_posix(),
                "HTTP_PROXY": "http://127.0.0.1:9",
                "HTTPS_PROXY": "http://127.0.0.1:9",
                "NO_PROXY": "",
            }
            started = time.monotonic()
            try:
                completed = subprocess.run(
                    command,
                    input=canonical_json_bytes(request),
                    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                    stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
                    cwd=sandbox,
                    env=environment,
                    timeout=int(context.adapter_config.get("timeout_seconds", self.timeout_seconds)),
                    check=False,
                    preexec_fn=_resource_limiter(
                        int(context.adapter_config.get("memory_mb", self.memory_mb)),
                        int(context.adapter_config.get("cpu_seconds", max(2, self.timeout_seconds))),
                        int(context.adapter_config.get("file_mb", 8)),
                    ) if os.name == "posix" else None,
                )
            except subprocess.TimeoutExpired as exc:
                raise DesignflowError(
                    "adapter timed out",
                    details={"code": "ADAPTER_TIMEOUT", "timeout_seconds": exc.timeout},
                ) from exc
            duration_ms = round((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000)
            if len(completed.stdout) > self.output_bytes or len(completed.stderr) > self.output_bytes:
                raise DesignflowError(
                    "adapter output exceeded the configured resource limit",
                    details={"code": "ADAPTER_RESOURCE_LIMIT"},
                )
            known = _known_secret_values(context.adapter_config)
            reject_secrets(
                {
                    "stdout": completed.stdout.decode("utf-8", errors="replace"),
                    "stderr": completed.stderr.decode("utf-8", errors="replace"),
                },
                known,
            )
            if completed.returncode != 0:
                code = "ADAPTER_RESOURCE_LIMIT" if completed.returncode < 0 or completed.returncode in {9, 137} else "ADAPTER_PROCESS_FAILED"
                raise DesignflowError(
                    f"adapter exited with {completed.returncode}",
                    details={"code": code, "stderr_sha256": sha256_bytes(completed.stderr), "duration_ms": duration_ms},
                )
            try:
                payload = json.loads(completed.stdout)
            except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
                raise ContractError("adapter stdout is not one JSON protocol document") from exc
            validate_adapter_fragment(payload)
            reject_secrets(payload, known)
            payload_adapter = dict(payload["adapter"])
            payload_adapter["environment_fingerprint"] = sha256_object(normalized_environment())
            return AdapterFragment(
                adapter=payload_adapter,
                facts=payload["facts"],
                relations=payload["relations"],
                capability_results=payload["capability_results"],
                diagnostics=payload["diagnostics"],
                inputs=payload["inputs"],
            )


def _known_secret_values(config: Mapping[str, Any]) -> list[str]:
    values = [str(item) for item in config.get("known_secret_values", []) if item]
    for key, value in os.environ.items():
        if key.startswith("DESIGNFLOW_TEST_SECRET") and value:
            values.append(value)
    return values


def deep_merge_values(
    left: Mapping[str, Any],
    right: Mapping[str, Any],
    left_rank: int,
    right_rank: int,
    *,
    path: str = "$",
) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], list[dict[str, Any]]]:
    merged: dict[str, Any] = {}
    conflicts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for key in sorted(set(left) | set(right)):
        if key not in left:
            merged[key] = copy.deepcopy(right[key])
            continue
        if key not in right:
            merged[key] = copy.deepcopy(left[key])
            continue
        left_value = left[key]
        right_value = right[key]
        if left_value == right_value:
            merged[key] = copy.deepcopy(left_value)
        elif isinstance(left_value, Mapping) and isinstance(right_value, Mapping):
            child, child_conflicts = deep_merge_values(
                left_value,
                right_value,
                left_rank,
                right_rank,
                path=f"{path}/{key}",
            )
            merged[key] = child
            conflicts.extend(child_conflicts)
        elif left_rank != right_rank:
            chosen = right_value if right_rank > left_rank else left_value
            merged[key] = copy.deepcopy(chosen)
            conflicts.append(
                {
                    "path": f"{path}/{key}",
                    "kind": "authority-selection",
                    "left_rank": left_rank,
                    "right_rank": right_rank,
                    "chosen": "right" if right_rank > left_rank else "left",
                }
            )
        else:
            merged[key] = copy.deepcopy(left_value)
            conflicts.append(
                {
                    "path": f"{path}/{key}",
                    "kind": "authority-conflict",
                    "left_sha256": sha256_object(left_value),
                    "right_sha256": sha256_object(right_value),
                }
            )
    return merged, conflicts


def _fact_rank(fact: Mapping[str, Any]) -> int:
    return max((AUTHORITY_RANK.get(item.get("authority", "unknown"), 0) for item in fact.get("evidence", [])), default=0)


def merge_fragments(
    project_id: str,
    profile_ids: Sequence[str],
    fragments: Sequence[AdapterFragment],
    *,
    identity_migrations: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any]] = (),
    trace_map: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any]] = (),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    facts: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
    relations: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
    diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    capability_results: dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]] = defaultdict(list)
    adapter_records: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    input_records: dict[tuple[str, str], dict[str, Any]] = {}
    authority_decisions: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for fragment in sorted(fragments, key=lambda item: (item.adapter.get("id", ""), item.adapter.get("version", ""))):
        payload = fragment.as_dict()
        validate_adapter_fragment(payload)
        adapter_records.append(canonicalize(dict(fragment.adapter)))
        for input_item in fragment.inputs:
            input_records[(input_item["path"], input_item.get("kind", "source"))] = canonicalize(input_item)
        diagnostics.extend(canonicalize(fragment.diagnostics))
        for result in fragment.capability_results:
            capability_results[result["capability_id"]].append(canonicalize(result))
        for fact in fragment.facts:
            current = facts.get(fact["fact_id"])
            if current is None:
                facts[fact["fact_id"]] = copy.deepcopy(fact)
                continue
            left_rank = _fact_rank(current)
            right_rank = _fact_rank(fact)
            merged_value, conflicts = deep_merge_values(current["value"], fact["value"], left_rank, right_rank)
            current["value"] = canonicalize(merged_value)
            current["evidence"] = sorted(
                {canonical_json_bytes(item): canonicalize(item) for item in [*current["evidence"], *fact["evidence"]]}.values(),
                key=canonical_json_bytes,
            )
            current["requirement_refs"] = sorted(set(current.get("requirement_refs", [])) | set(fact.get("requirement_refs", [])))
            current["test_refs"] = canonicalize([*current.get("test_refs", []), *fact.get("test_refs", [])])
            current["external_evidence_refs"] = canonicalize(
                [*current.get("external_evidence_refs", []), *fact.get("external_evidence_refs", [])]
            )
            for conflict in conflicts:
                decision = {
                    "fact_id": fact["fact_id"],
