                    "field": conflict["path"],
                    **conflict,
                    "left_adapter": current["evidence"][0].get("adapter", {}),
                    "right_adapter": fact["evidence"][0].get("adapter", {}),
                }
                authority_decisions.append(canonicalize(decision))
                if conflict["kind"] == "authority-conflict":
                    diagnostics.append(
                        diagnostic(
                            "AUTHORITY_CONFLICT",
                            "error",
                            f"equal-authority values conflict for {fact['fact_id']} at {conflict['path']}",
                            capability_id=fact["capability_id"],
                            details=decision,
                        )
                    )
        for relation in fragment.relations:
            current = relations.get(relation["relation_id"])
            if current is None:
                relations[relation["relation_id"]] = copy.deepcopy(relation)
            elif canonicalize(current) != canonicalize(relation):
                diagnostics.append(
                    diagnostic(
                        "RELATION_CONFLICT",
                        "error",
                        f"relation identity conflicts: {relation['relation_id']}",
                        capability_id=relation["capability_id"],
                    )
                )
    _apply_trace_map(facts, trace_map)
    all_fact_ids = set(facts)
    for relation_id, relation in list(relations.items()):
        if relation["from_fact_id"] not in all_fact_ids or relation["to_fact_id"] not in all_fact_ids:
            diagnostics.append(
                diagnostic(
                    "EXACT_LINK_ORPHAN",
                    "error",
                    f"exact relation endpoint is unresolved: {relation_id}",
                    capability_id=relation["capability_id"],
                    details={"from": relation["from_fact_id"], "to": relation["to_fact_id"]},
                )
            )
            relations.pop(relation_id)
    merged_results = _merge_capability_results(capability_results, diagnostics)
    ir = {
        "schema_version": IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
        "project_id": project_id,
        "profile_ids": sorted(set(profile_ids)),
        "facts": sorted((canonicalize(item) for item in facts.values()), key=lambda item: item["fact_id"]),
        "relations": sorted((canonicalize(item) for item in relations.values()), key=lambda item: item["relation_id"]),
        "identity_migrations": sorted((canonicalize(dict(item)) for item in identity_migrations), key=canonical_json_bytes),
        "capability_results": merged_results,
        "diagnostics": sorted(
            {item["diagnostic_id"]: canonicalize(item) for item in diagnostics}.values(),
            key=lambda item: item["diagnostic_id"],
        ),
        "metadata": {
            "generator": {"id": "designflow", "version": GENERATOR_VERSION},
            "adapters": sorted(adapter_records, key=canonical_json_bytes),
            "inputs": sorted(input_records.values(), key=lambda item: (item["path"], item.get("kind", ""))),
            "authority_decisions": sorted(authority_decisions, key=canonical_json_bytes),
            "normalized_environment": normalized_environment(),
        },
    }
    validate_ir(ir)
    reject_secrets(ir)
    return ir


def _apply_trace_map(facts: Mapping[str, dict[str, Any]], trace_map: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any]]) -> None:
    for mapping in trace_map:
        selected: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        if mapping.get("fact_id") in facts:
            selected = [facts[str(mapping["fact_id")]]]
        else:
            for fact in facts.values():
                if mapping.get("kind") and fact["kind"] != mapping["kind"]:
                    continue
                if mapping.get("natural_key") and fact["natural_key"] != mapping["natural_key"]:
                    continue
                if mapping.get("source_path") and not any(
                    evidence_item.get("source", {}).get("path") == mapping["source_path"]
                    for evidence_item in fact["evidence"]
                ):
                    continue
                selected.append(fact)
        for fact in selected:
            fact["requirement_refs"] = sorted(set(fact.get("requirement_refs", [])) | set(mapping.get("requirement_refs", [])))
            fact["test_refs"] = canonicalize([*fact.get("test_refs", []), *mapping.get("test_refs", [])])
            fact["external_evidence_refs"] = canonicalize(
                [*fact.get("external_evidence_refs", []), *mapping.get("external_evidence_refs", [])]
            )


def _merge_capability_results(
    grouped: Mapping[str, Sequence[Mapping[str, Any]]], diagnostics: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any]]
) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    diagnostic_by_capability: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)
    for item in diagnostics:
        if item.get("capability_id"):
            diagnostic_by_capability[str(item["capability_id"])].append(str(item["diagnostic_id"]))
    order = {status: index for index, status in enumerate(["exact", "derived", "observed", "not_applicable", "partial", "unknown", "unsupported", "conflict"])}
    results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for capability_id, items in sorted(grouped.items()):
        required = any(bool(item.get("required")) for item in items)
        statuses = [str(item.get("status")) for item in items]
        if diagnostic_by_capability.get(capability_id) and any(
            item.get("code") in {"AUTHORITY_CONFLICT", "RELATION_CONFLICT"} and item.get("capability_id") == capability_id
            for item in diagnostics
        ):
            status = "conflict"
        elif any(status in FAIL_CLOSED_STATUSES for status in statuses):
            status = max((item for item in statuses if item in FAIL_CLOSED_STATUSES), key=lambda value: order[value])
        elif "exact" in statuses:
            status = "exact"
        elif "derived" in statuses:
            status = "derived"
        elif "observed" in statuses:
            status = "observed"
        else:
            status = "not_applicable"
        precisions = sorted({str(item.get("precision")) for item in items if item.get("precision")})
        modes = sorted({str(item.get("mode")) for item in items if item.get("mode")})
        results.append(
            capability_result(
                capability_id,
                status,
                "+".join(precisions) if precisions else "unknown",
                required=required,
                enforcement=next((str(item.get("enforcement")) for item in items if item.get("enforcement")), "Invariant"),
                mode=modes[0] if len(modes) == 1 else "static",
                diagnostic_ids=diagnostic_by_capability.get(capability_id, []),
            )
        )
    return results


def project_graph(ir: Mapping[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    validate_ir(ir)
    nodes = [
        {
            "id": fact["fact_id"],
            "kind": fact["kind"],
            "label": str(fact["value"].get("name") or fact["value"].get("operation_id") or fact["natural_key"]),
            "project_id": ir["project_id"],
        }
        for fact in ir["facts"]
    ]
    edges = [
        {
            "id": relation["relation_id"],
            "kind": relation["kind"],
            "from": relation["from_fact_id"],
            "to": relation["to_fact_id"],
            "properties": relation.get("properties", {}),
        }
        for relation in ir["relations"]
    ]
    return {
        "schema_version": GRAPH_VERSION,
        "project_id": ir["project_id"],
        "nodes": sorted(nodes, key=lambda item: item["id"]),
        "edges": sorted(edges, key=lambda item: item["id"]),
    }


def render_graph_mmd(graph: Mapping[str, Any]) -> str:
    if graph.get("schema_version") != GRAPH_VERSION:
        raise ContractError("Mermaid renderer accepts design.graph.json projection only")
    lines = ["graph TD"]
    for node in graph.get("nodes", []):
        label = str(node.get("label", node["id"])).replace('"', "'")
        lines.append(f'  {stable_id("node", node["id"]).replace(":", "_")}["{label}"]')
    node_names = {node["id"]: stable_id("node", node["id"]).replace(":", "_") for node in graph.get("nodes", [])}
    for edge in graph.get("edges", []):
        if edge["from"] in node_names and edge["to"] in node_names:
            label = str(edge.get("kind", "relates")).replace('"', "'")
            lines.append(f'  {node_names[edge["from"]]} -->|"{label}"| {node_names[edge["to"]]}')
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"


def _markdown_banner(ir: Mapping[str, Any], title: str) -> list[str]:
    digest = sha256_object(ir)
    return [
        f"# {title}",
        "",
        "> [!WARNING]",
        "> このファイルは検証済み `design.ir.json` から生成されています。直接編集しないでください。",
        f"> Schema: `{ir['schema_version']}` / Bundle input digest: `{digest}`",
        "> Generate: `designflow generate` / Check: `designflow check`",
        "",
    ]


def _fact_table(ir: Mapping[str, Any], title: str, prefixes: Sequence[str]) -> str | None:
    selected = [fact for fact in ir["facts"] if any(fact["kind"].startswith(prefix) for prefix in prefixes)]
    if not selected:
        return None
    lines = _markdown_banner(ir, title)
    lines.extend(["| Fact ID | Kind | Natural key | Status / precision | Value |", "|---|---|---|---|---|"])
    capability_map = {item["capability_id"]: item for item in ir["capability_results"]}
    for fact in selected:
        result = capability_map.get(fact["capability_id"], {})
        compact = json.dumps(fact["value"], ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, separators=(",", ":"))
        lines.append(
            f"| `{fact['fact_id']}` | `{fact['kind']}` | `{fact['natural_key']}` | "
            f"`{result.get('status', 'unknown')}` / `{result.get('precision', 'unknown')}` | `{compact}` |"
        )
    lines.append("")
    return "\n".join(lines)


PROFILE_VIEWS: dict[str, dict[str, tuple[str, tuple[str, ...]]]] = {
    "backend": {
        "API_CATALOG.gen.md": ("APIカタログ", ("backend.operation",)),
        "INTERFACES.gen.md": ("インターフェース", ("backend.operation", "backend.schema")),
        "OPERATIONS.gen.md": ("処理", ("backend.operation", "backend.flow-step")),
        "SEQUENCES.gen.md": ("シーケンス", ("backend.flow-step",)),
        "DATA_MODEL.gen.md": ("データモデル", ("backend.table",)),
        "CRUD.gen.md": ("CRUD", ("backend.query", "backend.table")),
        "QUERY_OBJECTS.gen.md": ("クエリオブジェクト", ("backend.query",)),
        "TEST_SCENARIOS.gen.md": ("テストシナリオ", ("backend.test",)),
    },
    "frontend": {
        "IMPLEMENTATION.gen.md": (
            "Frontend実装",
            ("frontend.route", "frontend.component", "frontend.api-operation", "frontend.design-token", "frontend.responsive-rule"),
        ),
        "VERIFICATION_MAP.gen.md": (
            "Frontend検証マップ",
            ("frontend.state-scenario", "frontend.accessibility-assertion"),
        ),
    },
    "infrastructure": {
        "STACKS.gen.md": ("スタック", ("infra.stack",)),
        "RESOURCES.gen.md": ("リソース", ("infra.resource",)),
        "PARAMETERS.gen.md": ("パラメータ", ("infra.parameter",)),
        "DEPENDENCIES.gen.md": ("依存関係", ("infra.resource",)),
        "IAM.gen.md": ("IAM", ("infra.iam",)),
        "NETWORK.gen.md": ("ネットワーク", ("infra.network",)),
        "STATEFUL_RESOURCES.gen.md": ("Statefulリソース", ("infra.stateful", "infra.resource")),
        "EXTERNAL_REFERENCES.gen.md": ("外部参照", ("infra.external-reference",)),
        "CHANGE_RISKS.gen.md": ("変更リスク", ("infra.change-risk", "infra.resource")),
    },
    "batch": {
        "BATCH_CATALOG.gen.md": ("Batchカタログ", ("batch.job", "batch.trigger")),
        "JOBS.gen.md": ("Job", ("batch.job",)),
        "FLOWS.gen.md": ("Flow", ("batch.step",)),
        "EFFECTS.gen.md": ("Effect", ("batch.effect",)),
        "RECOVERY.gen.md": ("Recovery", ("batch.recovery",)),
        "VERIFICATION_MAP.gen.md": ("Batch検証マップ", ("batch.test-scenario",)),
    },
}


def render_traceability(ir: Mapping[str, Any]) -> str:
    lines = _markdown_banner(ir, "トレーサビリティ")
    lines.extend(
        [
            "| Fact ID | Requirement | Test | External evidence | Source | Adapter |",
            "|---|---|---|---|---|---|",
        ]
    )
    for fact in ir["facts"]:
        sources = [item.get("source", {}).get("path", "") for item in fact.get("evidence", [])]
        adapters = [item.get("adapter", {}).get("id", "") for item in fact.get("evidence", [])]
        lines.append(
            f"| `{fact['fact_id']}` | {', '.join(fact.get('requirement_refs', [])) or '-'} | "
            f"{_compact_refs(fact.get('test_refs', []))} | {_compact_refs(fact.get('external_evidence_refs', []))} | "
            f"{', '.join(sorted(set(sources))) or '-'} | {', '.join(sorted(set(adapters))) or '-'} |"
        )
    lines.append("")
    return "\n".join(lines)


def _compact_refs(values: Sequence[Any]) -> str:
    if not values:
        return "-"
    return ", ".join(
        str(value) if isinstance(value, str) else json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, separators=(",", ":"))
        for value in values
    )


def render_diagnostics(ir: Mapping[str, Any]) -> str | None:
    if not ir.get("diagnostics"):
        return None
    lines = _markdown_banner(ir, "診断")
    lines.extend(["| Code | Severity | Capability | Location | Detail |", "|---|---|---|---|---|"])
    for item in ir["diagnostics"]:
        location = item.get("location", {})
        locator = location.get("path", "-")
        if location.get("line"):
            locator += f":{location['line']}"
        lines.append(
            f"| `{item['code']}` | `{item['severity']}` | `{item.get('capability_id', '-')}` | "
            f"`{locator}` | {item['message']} |"
        )
    lines.append("")
    return "\n".join(lines)


def render_project_files(ir: Mapping[str, Any]) -> dict[str, bytes]:
    validate_ir(ir)
    files: dict[str, bytes] = {
        "design.ir.json": pretty_json_bytes(ir),
        "TRACEABILITY.gen.md": render_traceability(ir).encode("utf-8"),
    }
    graph = project_graph(ir)
    files["design.graph.json"] = pretty_json_bytes(graph)
    files["design.graph.mmd"] = render_graph_mmd(graph).encode("utf-8")
    diagnostic_view = render_diagnostics(ir)
    if diagnostic_view:
        files["DIAGNOSTICS.gen.md"] = diagnostic_view.encode("utf-8")
    for profile_id in ir["profile_ids"]:
        for name, (title, prefixes) in PROFILE_VIEWS.get(profile_id, {}).items():
            rendered = _fact_table(ir, title, prefixes)
            if rendered is not None:
                files[name] = rendered.encode("utf-8")
    reject_secrets({name: value.decode("utf-8") for name, value in files.items()})
    return dict(sorted(files.items()))


def load_config(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    config = load_data(path)
    if not isinstance(config, Mapping):
        raise ContractError("designflow config must be an object")
    if config.get("schema_version") != CONFIG_VERSION:
        raise ContractError(f"unsupported config schema_version: {config.get('schema_version')!r}")
    projects = config.get("projects")
    if not isinstance(projects, list) or not projects:
        raise ContractError("designflow config requires at least one project")
    ids = [project.get("id") for project in projects]
    if any(not isinstance(project_id, str) or not project_id for project_id in ids) or len(ids) != len(set(ids)):
        raise ContractError("project ids must be unique non-empty strings")
    return canonicalize(dict(config))


def discover(root: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    root = root.resolve()
    candidates: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    checks = [
        ("backend", "fastapi-python", ["**/*.py"], lambda path: "fastapi" in path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")),
        ("backend", "openapi", ["**/openapi.json", "**/openapi.yaml", "**/openapi.yml"], lambda path: True),
        ("backend", "ddl-sql", ["**/*.sql"], lambda path: True),
        ("infrastructure", "cloudformation", ["**/template.json", "**/template.yaml", "**/template.yml"], lambda path: True),
        ("frontend", "frontend-manifest", ["**/frontend.design.json"], lambda path: True),
        ("batch", "batch-workflow-manifest", ["**/batch.design.json"], lambda path: True),
    ]
    for profile, adapter_id, patterns, predicate in checks:
        matches: list[str] = []
        for pattern in patterns:
            for path in root.glob(pattern):
                if path.is_file() and ".git" not in path.parts and predicate(path):
                    matches.append(repository_relative(root, path))
        if matches:
            candidates.append(
                {
                    "profile_id": profile,
                    "adapter_id": adapter_id,
                    "inputs": sorted(set(matches)),
                    "support_lifecycle": _registry_lifecycle(root, adapter_id),
                }
            )
    return {
        "schema_version": "designflow-discovery/v1.0",
        "root": ".",
        "candidates": sorted(candidates, key=lambda item: (item["profile_id"], item["adapter_id"])),
        "unsupported": [],
    }


def _registry_lifecycle(root: Path, adapter_id: str) -> str:
    path = root / "governance/design-adapters/support-registry.json"
    if not path.exists():
        return "candidate"
    try:
        registry = load_data(path)
    except (OSError, ValueError, ContractError):
        return "candidate"
    for entry in registry.get("entries", []):
        if entry.get("adapter_id") == adapter_id:
            return str(entry.get("support_lifecycle", "candidate"))
    return "candidate"


def _find_project(config: Mapping[str, Any], project_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    for project in config["projects"]:
        if project["id"] == project_id:
            return dict(project)
    raise ContractError(f"project is not declared: {project_id}")


def _legacy_manifest(path: Path) -> bool:
    if not path.exists():
        return False
    try:
        manifest = load_data(path)
    except Exception:
        return True
    return manifest.get("schema_version") != BUNDLE_VERSION


def _run_project_ir(root: Path, project: Mapping[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    project_root = resolve_declared_path(root, str(project.get("root", ".")))
    if not project_root.is_dir():
        raise ContractError(f"project root is not a directory: {project.get('root')}")
    profile_ids = tuple(str(item) for item in project.get("profiles", []))
    if not profile_ids:
        raise ContractError(f"project {project['id']} declares no profiles")
    runner = AdapterRunner()
    fragments: list[AdapterFragment] = []
    for adapter_config in project.get("adapters", []):
        adapter_id = str(adapter_config.get("id", ""))
        context = AdapterContext(
            root=project_root,
            project_id=str(project["id"]),
            profile_ids=profile_ids,
            adapter_config=adapter_config,
            normalized_environment=normalized_environment(),
        )
        if adapter_config.get("manifest"):
            manifest_path = resolve_declared_path(project_root, str(adapter_config["manifest"]))
            fragments.append(runner.run_process(manifest_path, context))
        else:
            fragments.append(runner.run_builtin(adapter_id, context))
    ir = merge_fragments(
        str(project["id"]),
        profile_ids,
        fragments,
        identity_migrations=project.get("identity_migrations", []),
        trace_map=project.get("trace_map", []),
    )
    configured_required = set(project.get("required_capabilities", []))
    if configured_required:
        by_id = {item["capability_id"]: item for item in ir["capability_results"]}
        for capability_id in configured_required:
            if capability_id not in by_id:
                item = capability_result(capability_id, "unsupported", "unknown", required=True)
                ir["capability_results"].append(item)
                ir["diagnostics"].append(
                    diagnostic(
                        "REQUIRED_CAPABILITY_UNSUPPORTED",
                        "error",
                        f"no adapter produced required capability {capability_id}",
                        capability_id=capability_id,
                    )
                )
            else:
                by_id[capability_id]["required"] = True
        ir["capability_results"] = sorted(ir["capability_results"], key=lambda item: item["capability_id"])
        ir["diagnostics"] = sorted(ir["diagnostics"], key=lambda item: item["diagnostic_id"])
    validate_ir(ir)
    reject_secrets(ir, project.get("redaction", {}).get("known_values", []))
    return ir


def _orphan_trace_diagnostics(previous_ir: Mapping[str, Any], current_ir: Mapping[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    current_ids = {fact["fact_id"] for fact in current_ir["facts"]}
    migrated = {item["old_fact_id"] for item in current_ir.get("identity_migrations", [])}
    diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for fact in previous_ir.get("facts", []):
        if fact["fact_id"] in current_ids or fact["fact_id"] in migrated:
            continue
        if fact.get("requirement_refs") or fact.get("test_refs"):
            diagnostics.append(
                diagnostic(
                    "ORPHAN_TRACE_AFTER_RENAME",
                    "error",
                    f"traced fact was removed without explicit identity migration: {fact['fact_id']}",
                    capability_id=fact.get("capability_id"),
                    details={
                        "fact_id": fact["fact_id"],
                        "requirement_refs": fact.get("requirement_refs", []),
                        "test_refs": fact.get("test_refs", []),
                    },
                )
            )
    return diagnostics


def build_project_bundle(
    root: Path,
    config: Mapping[str, Any],
    project_id: str,
    *,
    check: bool = False,
    output_override: Path | None = None,
) -> BundleResult:
    project = _find_project(config, project_id)
    output_dir = output_override or root / str(project.get("output", f"docs/design/generated/{project_id}"))
    manifest_path = output_dir / "manifest.json"
    if _legacy_manifest(manifest_path):
        raise MigrationRequired(
            f"legacy bundle detected at {repository_relative(root, manifest_path)}",
            details={"path": repository_relative(root, manifest_path)},
        )
    ir = _run_project_ir(root, project)
    previous_ir_path = output_dir / "design.ir.json"
    if check and previous_ir_path.exists():
        previous_ir = load_data(previous_ir_path)
        orphan_diagnostics = _orphan_trace_diagnostics(previous_ir, ir)
        if orphan_diagnostics:
            ir["diagnostics"].extend(orphan_diagnostics)
            affected = {item.get("capability_id") for item in orphan_diagnostics if item.get("capability_id")}
            for result in ir["capability_results"]:
                if result["capability_id"] in affected:
                    result["status"] = "unknown"
                    result["diagnostic_ids"] = sorted(
                        set(result.get("diagnostic_ids", []))
                        | {item["diagnostic_id"] for item in orphan_diagnostics if item.get("capability_id") == result["capability_id"]}
                    )
            ir["diagnostics"] = sorted(ir["diagnostics"], key=lambda item: item["diagnostic_id"])
    files = render_project_files(ir)
    config_path = root / str(config.get("config_path", "designflow.yaml"))
    config_digest = sha256_bytes(config_path.read_bytes()) if config_path.exists() else sha256_object(config)
    manifest = {
        "schema_version": BUNDLE_VERSION,
        "project": {"id": project_id, "profiles": sorted(project.get("profiles", [])), "root": project.get("root", ".")},
        "generator": {"id": "designflow", "version": GENERATOR_VERSION},
        "ir_schema_version": IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
        "protocol_version": PROTOCOL_VERSION,
        "config": {"path": config.get("config_path", "designflow.yaml"), "sha256": config_digest},
        "inputs": ir["metadata"]["inputs"],
        "adapters": ir["metadata"]["adapters"],
        "renderer": {"id": "designflow-renderer", "version": RENDERER_VERSION},
        "capability_results": ir["capability_results"],
        "files": [
            {"path": name, "sha256": sha256_bytes(content), "size": len(content)} for name, content in sorted(files.items())
        ],
        "commands": {
            "generate": f"designflow generate --config {config.get('config_path', 'designflow.yaml')} --project {project_id}",
            "check": f"designflow check --config {config.get('config_path', 'designflow.yaml')} --project {project_id}",
        },
        "semantic_digest": sha256_object(
            {
                "facts": ir["facts"],
                "relations": ir["relations"],
                "capability_results": ir["capability_results"],
                "diagnostics": ir["diagnostics"],
            }
        ),
    }
    files = {**files, "manifest.json": pretty_json_bytes(manifest)}
    reject_secrets({name: value.decode("utf-8") for name, value in files.items()}, project.get("redaction", {}).get("known_values", []))
    failures = required_capability_failures(ir)
    exit_code = 2 if failures else 0
    if check:
        drift = compare_bundle(output_dir, files)
        if drift:
            raise DriftDetected(
                f"generated bundle drift detected for {project_id}",
                details={"project_id": project_id, "changes": drift},
            )
    else:
        _atomic_write_bundle(output_dir, files)
    return BundleResult(project_id, output_dir, files, ir, manifest, exit_code)


def compare_bundle(output_dir: Path, expected: Mapping[str, bytes]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    actual_names = {
        path.relative_to(output_dir).as_posix()
        for path in output_dir.rglob("*")
        if path.is_file() and not path.name.startswith(".")
    } if output_dir.exists() else set()
    expected_names = set(expected)
    changes: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for name in sorted(expected_names - actual_names):
        changes.append({"path": name, "change": "add"})
    for name in sorted(actual_names - expected_names):
        changes.append({"path": name, "change": "delete"})
    for name in sorted(actual_names & expected_names):
        actual = (output_dir / name).read_bytes()
        if actual != expected[name]:
            changes.append(
                {
                    "path": name,
                    "change": "modify",
                    "actual_sha256": sha256_bytes(actual),
                    "expected_sha256": sha256_bytes(expected[name]),
                }
            )
    return changes


def _atomic_write_bundle(output_dir: Path, files: Mapping[str, bytes]) -> None:
    output_dir.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="designflow-bundle-", dir=output_dir.parent) as temporary:
        staging = Path(temporary) / output_dir.name
        staging.mkdir()
        for name, content in sorted(files.items()):
            path = staging / name
            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            path.write_bytes(content)
        if output_dir.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(output_dir)
        staging.replace(output_dir)


def build_system_bundle(root: Path, config: Mapping[str, Any], project_results: Sequence[BundleResult], *, check: bool = False) -> BundleResult | None:
    if len(project_results) < 2 and not config.get("system_links"):
        return None
    facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    relations: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    diagnostics: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    capabilities: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    project_fact_index: dict[tuple[str, str, str], list[str]] = defaultdict(list)
    manifests: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for result in project_results:
        facts.extend(copy.deepcopy(result.ir["facts"]))
        relations.extend(copy.deepcopy(result.ir["relations"]))
        diagnostics.extend(copy.deepcopy(result.ir["diagnostics"]))
        capabilities.extend(copy.deepcopy(result.ir["capability_results"]))
        for fact in result.ir["facts"]:
            project_fact_index[(result.project_id, fact["kind"], fact["natural_key"])].append(fact["fact_id"])
        manifests.append(
            {
                "project_id": result.project_id,
                "manifest_sha256": sha256_bytes(result.files["manifest.json"]),
                "ir_sha256": sha256_bytes(result.files["design.ir.json"]),
            }
        )
    for index, link in enumerate(config.get("system_links", [])):
        from_selector = link.get("from", {})
        to_selector = link.get("to", {})
        from_ids = project_fact_index.get(
            (str(from_selector.get("project")), str(from_selector.get("kind")), str(from_selector.get("natural_key"))), []
        )
        to_ids = project_fact_index.get(
            (str(to_selector.get("project")), str(to_selector.get("kind")), str(to_selector.get("natural_key"))), []
        )
        if len(from_ids) != 1 or len(to_ids) != 1:
            code = "SYSTEM_LINK_CONFLICT" if len(from_ids) > 1 or len(to_ids) > 1 else "SYSTEM_LINK_ORPHAN"
            diagnostics.append(
                diagnostic(
                    code,
                    "error",
                    f"system exact link cannot be resolved uniquely: {link}",
                    capability_id="system.cross-domain-links",
                    details={"from_matches": from_ids, "to_matches": to_ids},
                )
            )
            continue
        relations.append(
            {
                "relation_id": stable_id("relation", "system", link.get("kind", "system.relates"), index, from_ids[0], to_ids[0]),
                "kind": str(link.get("kind", "system.relates")),
                "natural_key": str(link.get("id") or f"system-link-{index}"),
                "capability_id": "system.cross-domain-links",
                "from_fact_id": from_ids[0],
                "to_fact_id": to_ids[0],
                "properties": canonicalize(link.get("properties", {})),
                "evidence": [],
            }
        )
    system_status = "conflict" if any(item["code"] == "SYSTEM_LINK_CONFLICT" for item in diagnostics) else (
        "unknown" if any(item["code"] == "SYSTEM_LINK_ORPHAN" for item in diagnostics) else "exact"
    )
    capabilities.append(
        capability_result(
            "system.cross-domain-links",
            system_status,
            "exact-mapping",
            required=bool(config.get("system_links")),
        )
    )
    ir = {
        "schema_version": IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
        "project_id": "system",
        "profile_ids": ["system"],
        "facts": sorted(facts, key=lambda item: item["fact_id"]),
        "relations": sorted(relations, key=lambda item: item["relation_id"]),
        "identity_migrations": [],
        "capability_results": sorted(capabilities, key=lambda item: (item["capability_id"], item.get("status", ""))),
        "diagnostics": sorted(
            {item["diagnostic_id"]: item for item in diagnostics}.values(), key=lambda item: item["diagnostic_id"]
        ),
        "metadata": {
            "generator": {"id": "designflow", "version": GENERATOR_VERSION},
            "adapters": [],
            "inputs": manifests,
            "authority_decisions": [],
            "normalized_environment": normalized_environment(),
        },
    }
    validate_ir(ir, ["system"])
    graph = project_graph(ir)
    overview = _fact_table(ir, "System overview", ("backend.", "frontend.", "infra.", "batch.")) or ""
    files: dict[str, bytes] = {
        "design.ir.json": pretty_json_bytes(ir),
        "design.graph.json": pretty_json_bytes(graph),
        "design.graph.mmd": render_graph_mmd(graph).encode(),
        "SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.gen.md": overview.encode(),
        "SYSTEM_GRAPH.gen.md": render_graph_mmd(graph).encode(),
        "TRACEABILITY.gen.md": render_traceability(ir).encode(),
    }
    diagnostics_view = render_diagnostics(ir)
    if diagnostics_view:
        files["DIAGNOSTICS.gen.md"] = diagnostics_view.encode()
    manifest = {
        "schema_version": BUNDLE_VERSION,
        "project": {"id": "system", "profiles": ["system"], "root": "."},
        "generator": {"id": "designflow", "version": GENERATOR_VERSION},
        "ir_schema_version": IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
        "protocol_version": PROTOCOL_VERSION,
        "config": {"path": config.get("config_path", "designflow.yaml"), "sha256": sha256_object(config)},
        "inputs": manifests,
        "adapters": [],
        "renderer": {"id": "designflow-system-renderer", "version": RENDERER_VERSION},
        "capability_results": ir["capability_results"],
        "files": [{"path": name, "sha256": sha256_bytes(content), "size": len(content)} for name, content in sorted(files.items())],
        "commands": {"generate": "designflow generate --system", "check": "designflow check --system"},
        "semantic_digest": sha256_object({"facts": ir["facts"], "relations": ir["relations"], "diagnostics": ir["diagnostics"]}),
    }
    files["manifest.json"] = pretty_json_bytes(manifest)
    output_dir = root / str(config.get("system_output", "docs/design/generated/system"))
    if check:
        drift = compare_bundle(output_dir, files)
        if drift:
            raise DriftDetected("system bundle drift detected", details={"changes": drift})
    else:
        _atomic_write_bundle(output_dir, files)
    return BundleResult("system", output_dir, files, ir, manifest, 2 if required_capability_failures(ir) else 0)


def generate_all(root: Path, config_path: Path, project_ids: Sequence[str] = (), *, check: bool = False) -> list[BundleResult]:
    config = load_config(config_path)
    config["config_path"] = repository_relative(root, config_path)
    selected = list(project_ids) or [str(project["id"]) for project in config["projects"]]
    results = [build_project_bundle(root, config, project_id, check=check) for project_id in selected]
    if not project_ids or set(selected) == {str(project["id"]) for project in config["projects"]}:
        system = build_system_bundle(root, config, results, check=check)
        if system:
            results.append(system)
    return results


def explain(ir: Mapping[str, Any], selector: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    validate_ir(ir, ir.get("profile_ids"))
    facts = [fact for fact in ir["facts"] if selector in {fact["fact_id"], fact["natural_key"], fact["capability_id"]}]
    relations = [
        relation
        for relation in ir["relations"]
        if selector in {relation["relation_id"], relation["natural_key"], relation["capability_id"], relation["from_fact_id"], relation["to_fact_id"]}
    ]
    diagnostics = [
        item
        for item in ir["diagnostics"]
        if selector in {item["diagnostic_id"], item.get("code"), item.get("capability_id")}
    ]
    capabilities = [item for item in ir["capability_results"] if selector == item["capability_id"]]
    authority_decisions = [item for item in ir.get("metadata", {}).get("authority_decisions", []) if selector == item.get("fact_id")]
    if not any((facts, relations, diagnostics, capabilities, authority_decisions)):
        raise ContractError(f"selector did not match a fact, relation, capability, or diagnostic: {selector}")
    return canonicalize(
        {
            "schema_version": "designflow-explain/v1.0",
            "selector": selector,
            "facts": facts,
            "relations": relations,
            "capabilities": capabilities,
            "diagnostics": diagnostics,
            "authority_decisions": authority_decisions,
        }
    )


def describe_capabilities(root: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    registry_path = root / "governance/design-adapters/support-registry.json"
    registry = load_data(registry_path) if registry_path.exists() else {"schema_version": SUPPORT_REGISTRY_VERSION, "entries": []}
    validate_support_registry(registry)
    manifests: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for path in sorted((root / "spec/design-ir/adapters").glob("*/adapter-manifest.json")) if (root / "spec/design-ir/adapters").exists() else []:
        manifest = load_data(path)
        validate_adapter_manifest(manifest)
        manifests.append({**manifest, "path": repository_relative(root, path)})
    return {
        "schema_version": "designflow-capabilities/v1.0",
        "registry_version": registry["schema_version"],
        "adapters": sorted(manifests, key=lambda item: item["adapter_id"]),
        "support": sorted(registry.get("entries", []), key=lambda item: (item.get("adapter_id", ""), item.get("capability_id", ""))),
    }


def migrate_bundle(root: Path, bundle: Path, *, apply: bool) -> dict[str, Any]:
    manifest_path = bundle / "manifest.json"
    if not manifest_path.exists():
        raise ContractError(f"bundle has no manifest.json: {bundle}")
    manifest = load_data(manifest_path)
    if manifest.get("schema_version") == BUNDLE_VERSION:
        return {"schema_version": "designflow-migration-report/v1.0", "status": "not-required", "changes": []}
    legacy_files = sorted(path.relative_to(bundle).as_posix() for path in bundle.rglob("*") if path.is_file())
    facts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for name in legacy_files:
        path = bundle / name
        if name == "manifest.json":
            continue
        ev = {
            "evidence_id": stable_id("evidence", name, sha256_bytes(path.read_bytes())),
            "authority": "external",
            "precision": "legacy-preserved",
            "mode": "static",
            "source": {"path": repository_relative(root, path)},
            "input_sha256": sha256_bytes(path.read_bytes()),
            "adapter": {"id": "legacy-bundle-migrator", "version": GENERATOR_VERSION},
        }
        facts.append(
            make_fact(
                bundle.name,
                "legacy.artifact",
                name,
                "legacy.compatibility",
                {"path": name, "sha256": sha256_bytes(path.read_bytes())},
                [ev],
            )
        )
    ir = {
        "schema_version": IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
        "project_id": bundle.name,
        "profile_ids": ["legacy"],
        "facts": facts,
        "relations": [],
        "identity_migrations": [],
        "capability_results": [capability_result("legacy.compatibility", "exact", "legacy-preserved")],
        "diagnostics": [],
        "metadata": {
            "generator": {"id": "designflow-migrate", "version": GENERATOR_VERSION},
            "adapters": [{"id": "legacy-bundle-migrator", "version": GENERATOR_VERSION, "mode": "static"}],
            "inputs": [{"path": repository_relative(root, manifest_path), "kind": "legacy-manifest", "sha256": sha256_bytes(manifest_path.read_bytes())}],
            "authority_decisions": [],
            "normalized_environment": normalized_environment(),
        },
    }
    validate_ir(ir, ["legacy"])
    new_manifest = {
        "schema_version": BUNDLE_VERSION,
        "project": {"id": bundle.name, "profiles": ["legacy"], "root": "."},
        "generator": {"id": "designflow-migrate", "version": GENERATOR_VERSION},
        "ir_schema_version": IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
        "protocol_version": PROTOCOL_VERSION,
        "config": {"path": "legacy", "sha256": sha256_object(manifest)},
        "inputs": ir["metadata"]["inputs"],
        "adapters": ir["metadata"]["adapters"],
        "renderer": {"id": "legacy-compatibility", "version": RENDERER_VERSION},
        "capability_results": ir["capability_results"],
        "files": [],
        "commands": {"generate": "designflow migrate --apply", "check": "designflow migrate --check"},
        "semantic_digest": sha256_object(ir),
        "migration": {"from_schema_version": manifest.get("schema_version", "legacy/unknown"), "compatibility_files": legacy_files},
    }
    changes = [
        {"path": "manifest.json", "change": "schema-replace"},
        {"path": "design.ir.json", "change": "add"},
    ]
    report = {
        "schema_version": "designflow-migration-report/v1.0",
        "status": "applied" if apply else "required",
        "schema_diff": {"from": manifest.get("schema_version", "legacy/unknown"), "to": BUNDLE_VERSION},
        "semantic_diff": {"legacy_artifact_count": len(facts), "lossy": False},
        "file_changes": changes,
        "compatibility_mapping": {name: name for name in legacy_files if name.endswith(".gen.md")},
    }
    if apply:
        (bundle / "design.ir.json").write_bytes(pretty_json_bytes(ir))
        (bundle / "manifest.json").write_bytes(pretty_json_bytes(new_manifest))
    return report


def _semantic_projection(ir: Mapping[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    return sorted(
        [
            {
                "kind": fact["kind"],
                "natural_key": fact["natural_key"],
                "value": fact["value"],
            }
            for fact in ir["facts"]
            if fact["kind"] in {"backend.operation", "backend.table", "infra.resource", "frontend.route", "batch.job"}
        ],
        key=canonical_json_bytes,
    )


def run_conformance(root: Path, *, real_toolchain: bool = False, adapter_manifest: Path | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
    started = time.perf_counter()
    layers: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    sample_ir = {
        "schema_version": IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
        "project_id": "sample",
        "profile_ids": ["backend"],
        "facts": [],
        "relations": [],
        "identity_migrations": [],
        "capability_results": [],
        "diagnostics": [],
        "metadata": {"generator": {}, "adapters": [], "inputs": [], "authority_decisions": [], "normalized_environment": normalized_environment()},
    }
    validate_ir(sample_ir)
    if adapter_manifest:
        validate_adapter_manifest(load_data(adapter_manifest))
    layers.append({"layer": 1, "name": "protocol-manifest-schema", "status": "pass"})

    corpus_root = root / "tests/fixtures/designflow/conformance/backend"
    positive_results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    negative_results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for case_path in sorted(corpus_root.glob("*/case.json")):
        case = load_data(case_path)
        project_root = case_path.parent
        context = AdapterContext(
            root=project_root,
            project_id=case["id"],
            profile_ids=("backend",),
            adapter_config={"id": case["adapter"], "inputs": case["inputs"], "required": True},
            normalized_environment=normalized_environment(),
        )
        fragment = AdapterRunner().run_builtin(case["adapter"], context)
        ir = merge_fragments(case["id"], ["backend"], [fragment])
        projection = _semantic_projection(ir)
        if case["kind"] == "positive":
            expected = canonicalize(case["expected_projection"])
            if projection != expected:
                raise ContractError(f"positive conformance mismatch for {case['id']}")
            positive_results.append({"id": case["id"], "digest": sha256_object(projection)})
        else:
            codes = {item["code"] for item in ir["diagnostics"]}
            if case["expected_diagnostic"] not in codes or not required_capability_failures(ir):
                raise ContractError(f"negative conformance did not fail closed for {case['id']}")
            negative_results.append({"id": case["id"], "diagnostic": case["expected_diagnostic"]})
    if len(positive_results) < 5:
        raise ContractError("backend conformance corpus requires five positive frameworks")
    layers.append({"layer": 2, "name": "positive-semantic-projection", "status": "pass", "cases": positive_results})
    layers.append({"layer": 3, "name": "negative-no-silent-omission", "status": "pass", "cases": negative_results})

    conflict_root = root / "tests/fixtures/designflow/phase1"
    if conflict_root.exists():
        config = load_config(conflict_root / "designflow.yaml")
        config["config_path"] = "designflow.yaml"
        project = _find_project(config, "orders-backend")
        ir = _run_project_ir(conflict_root, project)
        if any(item["code"] == "AUTHORITY_CONFLICT" for item in ir["diagnostics"]):
            raise ContractError("phase1 positive fixture has an authority conflict")
    synthetic_path = root / "tests/fixtures/designflow/conformance/conflict"
    if synthetic_path.exists():
        config = load_config(synthetic_path / "designflow.yaml")
        config["config_path"] = "designflow.yaml"
        ir = _run_project_ir(synthetic_path, _find_project(config, "conflict"))
        if not any(item["code"] == "AUTHORITY_CONFLICT" for item in ir["diagnostics"]):
            raise ContractError("authority conflict fixture was not retained")
    layers.append({"layer": 4, "name": "authority-conflict-ambiguity", "status": "pass"})

    if conflict_root.exists():
        first = _run_project_ir(conflict_root, _find_project(config=load_config(conflict_root / "designflow.yaml"), project_id="orders-backend"))
        second = copy.deepcopy(first)
        if second["facts"]:
            second["facts"][0]["value"]["mutation"] = True
        if sha256_object(_semantic_projection(first)) == sha256_object(_semantic_projection(second)):
            raise ContractError("semantic mutation was not detectable")
    layers.append({"layer": 5, "name": "mutation-drift", "status": "pass"})

    deterministic_cases: list[str] = []
    for case_path in sorted(corpus_root.glob("*/case.json")):
        case = load_data(case_path)
        if case["kind"] != "positive":
            continue
        context = AdapterContext(
            root=case_path.parent,
            project_id=case["id"],
            profile_ids=("backend",),
            adapter_config={"id": case["adapter"], "inputs": case["inputs"], "required": True},
            normalized_environment=normalized_environment(),
        )
        first = merge_fragments(case["id"], ["backend"], [AdapterRunner().run_builtin(case["adapter"], context)])
        old_tz = os.environ.get("TZ")
        os.environ["TZ"] = "Pacific/Honolulu"
        try:
            second = merge_fragments(case["id"], ["backend"], [AdapterRunner().run_builtin(case["adapter"], context)])
        finally:
            if old_tz is None:
                os.environ.pop("TZ", None)
            else:
                os.environ["TZ"] = old_tz
        if canonical_json_bytes(first) != canonical_json_bytes(second):
            raise ContractError(f"environment changed canonical IR bytes for {case['id']}")
        deterministic_cases.append(case["id"])
    layers.append({"layer": 6, "name": "mode-determinism-environment-normalization", "status": "pass", "cases": deterministic_cases})

    rendered_once = render_project_files(sample_ir)
    rendered_twice = render_project_files(copy.deepcopy(sample_ir))
    if rendered_once != rendered_twice:
        raise ContractError("renderer output is not byte deterministic")
    layers.append({"layer": 7, "name": "renderer-bundle-migration", "status": "pass"})

    security_root = root / "tests/fixtures/designflow/security"
    security_cases = _run_security_conformance(security_root) if security_root.exists() else []
    layers.append({"layer": 8, "name": "sandbox-path-resource-secret", "status": "pass", "cases": security_cases})

    toolchain = _real_toolchain_conformance(root) if real_toolchain else {
        "status": "external-evidence-required",
        "scope": "experimental adapters only; promotion is forbidden",
    }
    if real_toolchain and toolchain.get("status") != "pass":
        raise ContractError("real-toolchain conformance failed")
    layers.append({"layer": 9, "name": "real-framework-real-toolchain", **toolchain})

    registry_path = root / "governance/design-adapters/support-registry.json"
    if registry_path.exists():
        validate_support_registry(load_data(registry_path))
    elapsed_ms = round((time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000)
    return {
        "schema_version": CONFORMANCE_VERSION,
        "status": "pass",
        "layers": layers,
        "metrics": {
            "elapsed_ms": elapsed_ms,
            "positive_cases": len(positive_results),
            "negative_cases": len(negative_results),
            "fixture_files": len(list((root / "tests/fixtures/designflow").rglob("*"))) if (root / "tests/fixtures/designflow").exists() else 0,
        },
    }


def _run_security_conformance(root: Path) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    cases: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    runner = AdapterRunner(timeout_seconds=1, memory_mb=64, output_bytes=65_536)
    expected = {
        "path-escape": "SECURITY_REJECTION",
        "timeout": "ADAPTER_TIMEOUT",
        "resource": "ADAPTER_RESOURCE_LIMIT",
        "secret-log": "SECURITY_REJECTION",
        "secret-fragment": "SECURITY_REJECTION",
    }
    for name, code in expected.items():
        case_root = root / name
        config = load_data(case_root / "case.json")
        context = AdapterContext(
            root=case_root,
            project_id=name,
            profile_ids=("backend",),
            adapter_config=config["adapter"],
            normalized_environment=normalized_environment(),
        )
        try:
            runner.run_process(case_root / "adapter-manifest.json", context)
        except DesignflowError as exc:
            actual = str(exc.details.get("code") or exc.code)
            if actual != code:
                raise ContractError(f"security case {name} returned {actual}, expected {code}") from exc
            cases.append({"id": name, "diagnostic": actual})
        else:
            raise ContractError(f"security case {name} unexpectedly succeeded")
    return cases


def _real_toolchain_conformance(root: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    try:
        import fastapi  # type: ignore
    except ImportError as exc:
        return {"status": "fail", "reason": str(exc)}
    fixture = root / "tests/fixtures/designflow/real_toolchain/fastapi_app.py"
    namespace: dict[str, Any] = {}
    exec(compile(fixture.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), fixture.as_posix(), "exec"), namespace)
    app = namespace.get("app")
    if app is None:
        return {"status": "fail", "reason": "fixture did not export app"}
    document = app.openapi()
    if document.get("openapi", "").split(".", 1)[0] != "3" or "/orders" not in document.get("paths", {}):
        return {"status": "fail", "reason": "FastAPI did not produce expected OpenAPI"}
    return {
        "status": "pass",
        "framework": "fastapi",
        "framework_version": getattr(fastapi, "__version__", "unknown"),
        "python_version": ".".join(map(str, sys.version_info[:3])),
        "scope": "literal FastAPI decorators + executable OpenAPI 3.x contract",
        "known_unsupported": ["computed decorator paths without executable contract", "runtime registration outside declared app"],
    }


def _json_output(value: Any) -> None:
    sys.stdout.buffer.write(pretty_json_bytes(value))


def _resolve_cli_root(value: str) -> Path:
    return Path(value).resolve()


def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="designflow", description="Canonical Design IR platform")
    parser.add_argument("--root", default=".", help="repository root")
    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)

    discover_parser = subparsers.add_parser("discover")
    discover_parser.add_argument("--config-output")

    for name in ("generate", "check"):
        command = subparsers.add_parser(name)
        command.add_argument("--config", default="designflow.yaml")
        command.add_argument("--project", action="append", default=[])

    explain_parser = subparsers.add_parser("explain")
    explain_parser.add_argument("selector")
    explain_parser.add_argument("--ir", required=True)

    subparsers.add_parser("describe-capabilities")

    conformance_parser = subparsers.add_parser("conformance")
    conformance_parser.add_argument("--adapter")
    conformance_parser.add_argument("--real-toolchain", action="store_true")
    conformance_parser.add_argument("--json", action="store_true")

    migrate_parser = subparsers.add_parser("migrate")
    migrate_parser.add_argument("bundle")
    action = migrate_parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group(required=True)
    action.add_argument("--check", action="store_true")
    action.add_argument("--apply", action="store_true")
    return parser


def main(argv: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> int:
    parser = build_parser()
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
    root = _resolve_cli_root(args.root)
    try:
        if args.command == "discover":
            result = discover(root)
            _json_output(result)
            if args.config_output:
                candidate_projects = []
                by_profile: dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]] = defaultdict(list)
                for candidate in result["candidates"]:
                    by_profile[candidate["profile_id"]].append(candidate)
                for profile_id, candidates in sorted(by_profile.items()):
                    candidate_projects.append(
                        {
                            "id": profile_id,
                            "root": ".",
                            "profiles": [profile_id],
                            "adapters": [
                                {"id": item["adapter_id"], "inputs": item["inputs"], "required": False}
                                for item in candidates
                            ],
                        }
                    )
                output = root / args.config_output
                if output.exists():
                    raise ContractError(f"discover refuses to overwrite existing config: {args.config_output}")
                output.write_text(dump_yaml({"schema_version": CONFIG_VERSION, "projects": candidate_projects}), encoding="utf-8")
            return 0
        if args.command in {"generate", "check"}:
            config_path = resolve_declared_path(root, args.config)
            results = generate_all(root, config_path, args.project, check=args.command == "check")
            _json_output(
                {
                    "schema_version": "designflow-command-result/v1.0",
                    "command": args.command,
                    "projects": [
                        {
                            "project_id": result.project_id,
                            "output": repository_relative(root, result.output_dir),
                            "semantic_digest": result.manifest["semantic_digest"],
                            "exit_code": result.exit_code,
                        }
                        for result in results
                    ],
                }
            )
            return max((result.exit_code for result in results), default=0)
        if args.command == "explain":
            _json_output(explain(load_data(resolve_declared_path(root, args.ir)), args.selector))
            return 0
        if args.command == "describe-capabilities":
            _json_output(describe_capabilities(root))
            return 0
        if args.command == "conformance":
            manifest = resolve_declared_path(root, args.adapter) if args.adapter else None
            result = run_conformance(root, real_toolchain=args.real_toolchain, adapter_manifest=manifest)
            _json_output(result)
            return 0
        if args.command == "migrate":
            bundle = resolve_declared_path(root, args.bundle)
            _json_output(migrate_bundle(root, bundle, apply=args.apply))
            return 0
    except DesignflowError as exc:
        _json_output(
            {
                "schema_version": "designflow-error/v1.0",
                "code": exc.code,
                "message": str(exc),
                "details": exc.details,
            }
        )
        return 2
    except (OSError, ValueError) as exc:
        _json_output(
            {
                "schema_version": "designflow-error/v1.0",
                "code": "INPUT_ERROR",
                "message": str(exc),
                "details": {},
            }
        )
        return 2
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
